rows.translation: 艾琳娜
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original:
You've barely stepped into the temple before a pair of black-scaled salamanders, clad in imposing suits of field armor and carrying bladed staves, approach you. "Champion. Lady Eirina wishes to speak with you. Follow us."
    
    Their tone brooks no argument. 
    
    You're lead out of the familiar sanctuary and through a brass-reinforced door, through a descending stone passage, and into another chamber guarded by another pair of Astrida at its entrance. The door has a silver oroboros nailed into it, surrounded by interlocking [pc.isMage
        |warding runes, circles within circles of protective magic that would have taken even an archmage years to craft in such exacting detail
        |magic circles
    ]. 
    
    When you step inside, you're greeting by Ynes stretching over a stone slab table, heart-shaped ass thrust out at you while she shuffles through an enormous black-bound tome. Eirina is sitting on the table's edge beside her, using her tail-flame like a lantern while her thrall works through the pages. "Ah, there [pc.heShe] is!" the black-scale says, giving you a two-fingered wave. "[pc.name], come in. Welcome to the Order's stronghold."
    
    You glance around the stone-walled room, with its one big table, and walls covered with hanging shields and banners all displaying the same silver oroboros. There are three other doors, all with the same sort of runic pattern on them, along with the one you just stepped through all precisely facing the cardinal directions. The sanctum of the world's greatest mage-hunters is less imposing, and more... [silly
        |OCD
        |cold? Sterile. Every little thing in its place
    ]. 
    
    "Not much to look at, I know. We barely use the place." Eirina gestures to the tome Ynes is busy with. "Just a place to hold things that shouldn't be out in the world. Most of the year you'd barely see more than two Astrida here at a time. But this demon business has me worried enough to recall my sisters. And then there's whatever's wrong with Kythie..."
rows.translation:
你刚走进寺庙，就看到两只身披厚重战甲、手持带刃法杖的黑鳞蝾螈朝你走来。“冠军，艾琳娜女士希望与您交谈，请随我们而来。
    
    他们的语气不容置疑。

你被带出了那熟悉的庇护所，穿过一扇用黄铜加固的门，沿着一条向下延伸的石制通道，最终来到另一个房间——该房间的入口处同样由另一对名为阿斯特里达的守护者把守着。 门上钉着一枚银色的蛇形图案，周围环绕着相互交织的纹路。 [pc.isMage
        |防护符文，这些由层层防护魔法构成的圈环，即便是大法师耗费多年时间也难以将其制作得如此精妙细致。
        |魔法圆圈
    ]当你走进去时，Ynes正趴在一张石板桌上迎接你，她那心形的臀部朝你翘着，同时她正在翻阅一本厚厚的黑色封面的书。Eirina则坐在桌子的边缘，用她尾巴燃烧产生的火焰当作灯笼照明，而她的仆从则在翻动书页。“啊，来了。 [pc.heShe] 就是这个！”那个黑鳞生物说着，向你挥了挥两只手指。[pc.name]进来吧。欢迎来到这个组织的据点。”

你环顾了一下这个石墙环绕的房间：里面有一张大桌子，墙上挂满了盾牌和旗帜，上面都印着同样的银色漩涡图案。还有三扇门，每扇门上也都刻着同样的符文图案，而你刚刚进入的那扇门，正好分别朝向四个方位。这位世界上最著名的法师猎人的圣地，其实并没有那么令人印象深刻……反而显得更加…… [silly
        |强迫症
        |寒冷？无菌。每一样东西都井然有序地摆放在该在的位置。
    ]我知道，这里没什么好看的。我们几乎从不使用这个地方。”艾琳娜指了指伊内斯正在研究的那本典籍，“这里只是用来存放那些不应该暴露在外的东西罢了。一年中的大部分时间，这里同时出现的阿斯特里达也不会超过两个。但这次出现的恶魔事件让我非常担心，所以我决定把我的姐妹们叫回来。再加上凯西也出了些问题……

rows.translation: 恶魔商业

rows.original: What does Eirina know about your "demon business" exactly?
rows.translation: 艾琳娜究竟了解你那些“秘密行动”的哪些细节呢？
rows.raw: 'What does Eirina know about your "demon business" exactly?'

rows.translation: 凯西到底怎么了

rows.original: Maybe she can explain the Order's lack of involvement in this investigation?
rows.translation: 也许她能够解释一下为什么秩序组织没有参与这次调查呢？
rows.raw: "Maybe she can explain the Order's lack of involvement in this investigation?"

rows.translation: 刺客

rows.original: Delve a little deeper into the assassin himself.
rows.translation: 让我们更深入地了解一下这位刺客本人吧。
rows.raw: "Delve a little deeper into the assassin himself."

rows.translation: 艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: So what's the story with the two of them? They seem a little closer than just mistress and slave.
rows.translation: 那么他们俩之间到底有什么故事呢？他们的关系似乎比单纯的主人与仆从要亲密一些。
rows.raw: "So what's the story with the two of them? They seem a little closer than just mistress and slave."

rows.translation: 伊妮丝的追踪者

rows.original: So how did Ynes get dragged into this anyway?
rows.translation: 那么，Ynes究竟是怎么卷入这件事中的呢？
rows.raw: "So how did Ynes get dragged into this anyway?"

rows.translation: 伊妮丝的书
她手里拿的是什么？
刺客大师

rows.original: Does the Astrida have any suspects?
rows.translation: 阿斯特里达有没有任何嫌疑犯呢？
总结

rows.original: Was there anything else the girls wanted?
rows.translation: 女孩们还想要些什么吗？
rows.raw: "Was there anything else the girls wanted?"

rows.translation: 艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: Eirina flashes you a fang-toothed grin. "We know enough. [var0 |Normally I'm glad we Astrida are few in number, but with what's going on in Khor'minos, I wish the goddess had given me an army! Still, we mean to do what we can. We've killed several demons crossing the Greyvales. I doubt we'll see an end to that with the war on. |I'm very sad we didn't meet before you had a chance to drive a dagger into the demon horde's heart — because me saying how proud I am of your work doesn't mean much. I've had my hands full killing demons crossing the Greyvales, stragglers and spies alike, but I've watched your career from afar with great interest. |There have been reports of strange individuals in the Greyvale Mountains. A local cult, proclaiming that their Dark Queen has finally come. The Order has been aware of their existence since the Massacre of Hawkethorne almost two decades ago, but now they've gone from local rumor to active destabilization. ] Every sister I have to spare is withdrawing to Tychris as we speak to help deal with the problem. But we're spread far and wide, and it's taking time." "Have any of you actually seen Kasyrra?" "Their Dark Queen herself? No. But we've captured some cultists who have." Ynes adds, "They were most forthcoming. It was difficult to stop their rambling about her." "Yeah," Eirina nods. "Rare for an interrogation to feel so much like a sermon. They're certified whack-jobs, to the man."
rows.translation: 艾琳娜向你露出一个露着獠牙的微笑：“我们已经掌握了足够的信息。 [var0 |通常来说，我挺高兴我们阿斯特里达一族的人数并不多，但考虑到科尔米诺斯发生的那些事情，我真希望那位女神能赐予我一支军队！不过，我们还是会尽自己所能。我们已经消灭了几只在灰谷地区活动的恶魔。不过，既然战争还在继续，我觉得这种战斗恐怕永远也不会结束。 |我是 非常 真遗憾我们在你有机会直击恶魔军团的要害之前就没有相识——因为我说自己对你的成就感到多么自豪，其实并没有什么实际意义。这些年来，我一直在忙于消灭那些穿越灰谷的恶魔，无论是那些散落的敌军还是间谍，但我一直都非常关注你的发展历程。 |有报道称，在灰谷山脉出现了一些行为古怪的个体。一个当地邪教组织宣称，他们的“黑暗女王”终于降临了。自从近二十年前霍克索恩大屠杀之后，圣殿骑士团就已经知道这个邪教的存在了，但现在，他们已经从仅仅是一些地方性的谣言，发展成了威胁社会稳定的活跃势力。 ] 目前，我们所有能够抽调出来的姐妹都在前往提克里斯地区，以协助解决这个问题。不过我们分散在各个地方，因此需要一些时间才能集结完毕。” “你们当中有没有人真正…… 看到过 卡西拉？” “他们的黑暗女王本人？不。但我们抓到了一些崇拜她的狂热分子。” 伊内斯补充道：“那些人非常配合我们的调查。不过，获取这些信息确实挺困难的。 停止 他们对她说的那些废话……” “是啊，”艾琳娜点了点头，“这种审问过程竟然更像是一场说教，真是少见。那个男人，显然是个十足的疯子。

[var0 |Normally I'm glad we Astrida are few in number, but with what's going on in Khor'minos, I wish the goddess had given me an army! Still, we mean to do what we can. We've killed several demons crossing the Greyvales. I doubt we'll see an end to that with the war on. |I'm very sad we didn't meet before you had a chance to drive a dagger into the demon horde's heart — because me saying how proud I am of your work doesn't mean much. A local cult, proclaiming that their Dark Queen has finally come. The Order has been aware of their existence since the Massacre of Hawkethorne almost two decades ago, but now they've gone from local rumor to active destabilization. ] Every sister I have to spare is withdrawing to Tychris as we speak to help deal with the problem. But we're spread far and wide, and it's taking time." "Have any of you actually seen Kasyrra?" "Their Dark Queen herself? No. But we've captured some cultists who have." Ynes adds, "They were most forthcoming. It was difficult to stop their rambling about her." "Yeah," Eirina nods. "Rare for an interrogation to feel so much like a sermon. They're certified whack-jobs, to the man." "

rows.translation: 恶魔商业
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: "Ah, well, yeah. Tethys has been up my ass like a brothel itch. Not that I blame her." Eirina shifts her weight on the table's edge. "Not that I have kids, or ever will, but I help raise my younger sisters here in the Order. I'd lose my damn mind if something happened to them. But she was actively interfering with our investigation. Making it impossible to get anything done. So we had to cut her out. Not my fault she can't cope with it." Ynes gives her a look. "You could have been a bit more diplomatic." "Well, then we wouldn't have a [pc.mf |[pc.isFemboy |cute |handsome ] |beautiful ] Champion here. And that'd be a shame." "I suppose," Ynes says, rolling her eyes. Eirina turns her attention back to you. "So, yeah, the princess. Poor girl. She's not cursed per se. More like poisoned. It's got a magical, or alchemagical, component, but it's not a spell. And it's not a one-shot either." "What do you mean?" "I mean, we broke the effect on her. One of my sisters did to start with. Then it came back. So I went and did it myself. And I'm the best spellbreaker in the Order, bar none. Whatever's wrong with her isn't sticky, it's not recursive, it's being reapplied. And it tastes like shit, too." The Astrida grimaces. "I had to run out of the palace and puke after I pulled the magic out of her. Was like I was eating raw liver on a bed of dirty ass." "As opposed to clean ass," Ynes says. "Well, yeah. That's a good meal." Eirina slaps her scaly palm down on her thrall's expansive rear, hard enough to make her cheeks wobble. "You really would think rarified horny would taste good." "So do you have any idea who's behind it? And who hired that assassin?" "That's the rub," Eirina says, continuing to caress Ynes's butt until the witch swats her hand away. "The wanna-be sharpshooter was a local boy. A poor farmer's third son. He'd been nabbed for poaching a couple years ago and spent a day in the stockades, but that's the closest to a motive I can put on him. Ynes had never met him before, and he wasn't a regular at the temple. A lot of the farmer-folk go to Velunite churches out in the baronies." "In other words," Ynes says, "he was a total stranger. A nobody."
rows.translation: 啊，好吧，确实是这样。泰西斯这个女人一直让我烦得要命，不过我也不能怪她。”艾琳娜把身体重心移到桌边。“虽然我并没有孩子，也不打算要孩子，但在这里，我还是在帮助抚养我的妹妹们。 如果他们出了什么事，我真会疯掉的。但她一直在干扰我们的调查，导致我们根本无法开展工作。所以我们不得不将她排除在调查之外。她无法应对这种情况，这可不是我的错。 伊内斯看了她一眼：“你本可以表现得更圆滑一些。” “嗯，那样的话，我们就不会…… [pc.mf |[pc.isFemboy |可爱 |英俊的 ] |美丽 ] 这里的冠军啊。那样的话就太可惜了。” “我想也是吧，”伊内斯说着，翻了个白眼。 艾琳娜又将注意力转向你：“所以，没错，就是那位公主。可怜的姑娘……她并不适合这个角色。 被诅咒的 本身而言，更像是…… 中毒了它含有某种魔法成分，或者说是炼金术成分，但它并不是一个真正的咒语。而且，它也不是那种一次使用就能见效的东西。” “你是什么意思？” “我的意思是，我们曾经破坏了它的效果。最初是我的一个姐妹这么做的，后来那种效果又重新出现了。 于是我就亲自去做了。毫无疑问，我是整个组织里最出色的解咒师。她的状况根本不是什么“粘性效应”或“递归现象”，而是咒语被反复施加在了她身上。而且那味道简直糟透了……”阿斯特里达皱着眉头说道，“当我把那些魔法从她身上驱除后，我不得不跑出宫殿去呕吐。 感觉就像是在一堆脏东西上吃生肝一样。 跟那些干干净净的人可完全不一样，”伊内斯说道。 “嗯，确实。这顿饭可真‘美味’啊。”艾琳娜将她那布满鳞片的手掌狠狠地拍在仆从那宽大的臀部上，力度大到让她的脸颊都跟着晃动起来。“你真会以为那些珍贵的、充满欲望的东西会很好吃啊。” “那么，你有没有猜到是谁在背后指使这一切？又是谁雇用了那个刺客？ 问题就在这里，”艾琳娜说道，她继续轻抚伊妮斯的臀部，直到那位女巫一把拍开了她的手。“那个自诩为神枪手的人其实是当地的一个男孩，一个贫穷农民的第三个儿子。几年前他因为偷猎被抓过，被关在栅栏里待了一天，但这也算是我能为他找到的唯一动机了。伊妮斯之前从未见过他，而且他也不是那座寺庙的常客。很多农民都会去男爵领地里的维鲁尼特教堂。 换句话说，”伊内斯说道，“他只是一个完全陌生的人，一个无足轻重的小人物。

rows.translation: 凯西到底怎么了
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: No motive, no connection to the victim, a criminal record and a poor family... "So he was just a hired shot after all." Eirina snaps her fingers. "Exactly. And here's the kicker." The Astrida reaches into her weapon belt and draws out a wood disk. She flicks it to you with a smirk. "The guy got his windfall and immediately rented a red room at the House of Mallach. He paid a bunny-girl with pretty feet to do all sorts of things to him with a whole gold coin." You look at the wooden disk in your palm, completely devoid of inscription. Or value. [pc.isMage |"A glamor, or transmutation?" "Transmutation," Eirina says. "Good thought about the glamor, but that wouldn't pass the touch check for long. |You furrow your brow. "Magic counterfeiting?" "Exactly," Eirina says. " ] This is why we use electrum coins; they're almost impossible to spoof with magic or alchemy. But gold is gold to a whore, I guess, and she was happy to take it. Happier to let me swap it for real hawks after I undid the transmutation. Still, that's real advanced magic. Highly illegal, too." "Far beyond the ability of a grain-fed hick," Ynes adds. "This is the kind of magic that would require decades of dedicated training to master." "More evidence there's a powerful mage behind all this," you say. The girls both nod.
rows.translation: 没有作案动机，与受害者也没有任何关联，还有犯罪前科，家庭条件也很贫困……“所以，他终究只是一个受雇的枪手罢了。” 艾琳娜打了个响指：“没错。而最关键的一点就在这里。”阿斯特里达从武器带里拿出一个木盘。 她带着一丝笑意把东西扔给你：“那个家伙一下子赚了一大笔钱，立刻在马拉赫旅馆租了一间红色的房间。他还付给一个脚趾漂亮的小姑娘一枚金币，让她为自己做各种事情。 你看着掌心中的那块木盘，上面没有任何铭文，也没有任何价值。 [pc.isMage |是一种魅力，还是某种转变呢？” “转变，”艾琳娜说道，“关于魅力的想法很不错，但那样的变化很快就会被人发现。 |你皱起了眉头：“魔法伪造？” “没错，”艾琳娜说道。 ] 这就是我们使用电银币的原因：用魔法或炼金术来伪造它们几乎是不可能的。不过，对那个女人来说，黄金就是黄金吧，所以她很乐意接受它。而当我取消那次转化后，她更高兴的是能让我把电银币换成真正的鹰币。不过，无论如何…… 真实的 高级魔法。而且也是极其违法的。” “这种魔法远远超出了一个乡下土包子的能力范围，”伊内斯补充道，“要掌握这种魔法，需要花费数十年的时间进行专注的训练。” “这进一步证明了背后肯定有一位强大的法师在操纵这一切，”你说。 两个女孩都点了点头。

The Astrida reaches into her weapon belt and draws out a wood disk. She flicks it to you with a smirk. "The guy got his windfall and immediately rented a red room at the House of Mallach. He paid a bunny-girl with pretty feet to do all sorts of things to him with a whole gold coin." You look at the wooden disk in your palm, completely devoid of inscription. Or value. [pc.isMage |"A glamor, or transmutation?" "Transmutation," Eirina says. "Good thought about the glamor, but that wouldn't pass the touch check for long. |You furrow your brow. "Magic counterfeiting?" "Exactly," Eirina says. " ] This is why we use electrum coins; they're almost impossible to spoof with magic or alchemy. But gold is gold to a whore, I guess, and she was happy to take it. Happier to let me swap it for real hawks after I undid the transmutation. Still, that's real advanced magic. Highly illegal, too." "Far beyond the ability of a grain-fed hick," Ynes adds. "This is the kind of magic that would require decades of dedicated training to master." "More evidence there's a powerful mage behind all this," you say. The girls both nod. '

rows.translation: 刺客
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: "Ah, that's harsh. I don't really think of Ynes as a slave," Eirina says, running a claw around her oroboros pendant. "It is true in the strictest legal sense," Ynes says. She gives her owner a thin smile. "And it's not as though I can just walk off if I wanted to." Eirina groans. "Well, I'm not the one who decided to tattoo restricted magic all over your body, am I? Should have thought of that before you carved Hypercranial Incineration on your underboob! If you were actually a spellbook I'd keep you locked in a lead chest in a deep, dark cell!" "Oh, yes, I'm very glad my cell has a bed, and even a window." Both of them laugh. You can tell this is an argument the two of them have had several times, and neither takes very seriously. Ynes gives you an apologetic look. "We've been friends for years now, Champion. Don't mind us." "See? Friends!" Eirina says. "Just... not necessarily voluntary friends." "Though I think we'd have been friends in other circumstances," Ynes laughs. "If I'd been born a salamander of Tychris, rather than fated to be a dangerous, evil witch." Eirina's smile falters. "Evil is never fate, Ynes. You-" "I know!" Ynes groans, rolling her eyes. "Don't moralize me when I am joking, paladin." "Well don't give me opportunities to preach, witch!" Ynes sticks her tongue out. Eirina mirrors the gesture. This is a very different side of Ynes than she lets on at her desk job.
rows.translation: 啊，这么说太苛刻了。我其实并不认为伊内斯是奴隶啊，”艾琳娜一边说，一边用手指轻轻抚摸着自己佩戴的奥罗博罗斯吊坠。 “从最严格的法律意义上来说，确实如此，”伊内斯说道。她对着自己的主人露出一个淡淡的微笑，“而且，如果我想离开的话，也并不能随随便便就走掉啊。” 艾琳娜叹了口气：“嗯，毕竟决定在你身上纹上那些受限魔法纹身的又不是我，对吧？在给你纹身之前，真该考虑清楚这些问题的。 颅骨焚烧术 真是的！要是你真的那么做了的话…… 其实 我会把那本魔法书锁在一个沉重的箱子里，然后把你关在那个阴暗、黑暗的牢房里！” “哦，没错，我真的很高兴。 我的 那个牢房里有一张床，甚至还有窗户。”他们俩都笑了起来。你可以看出，这是他们已经讨论过很多次的话题，而且他们俩都没有太当真。 伊内斯向你投来了歉意的眼神：“我们已经是多年的朋友了，冠军。 别在意我们。” “看吧？我们是朋友！”艾琳娜说，“只不过……这些朋友关系未必是自愿建立的。” “不过我觉得，如果处在不同的环境下，我们或许也会成为朋友。”伊内斯笑着说，“如果我出生在提克里斯，而不是注定要成为一个危险而邪恶的女巫的话。艾琳娜的笑容顿时消失了。“邪恶从来都不是命运，伊内斯……你……” “我知道！”伊内斯叹了口气，翻了个白眼，“当我只是在开玩笑的时候，就别来教训我啦，圣骑士。” “那你就别给我机会说教啊，女巫！英尼斯吐出了舌头，艾琳娜也模仿了这个动作。 这真是…… 非常 与她在办公室工作时表现出来的形象不同，Ynes还有另一面。

She gives her owner a thin smile. "And it's not as though I can just walk off if I wanted to." Eirina groans. "Well, I'm not the one who decided to tattoo restricted magic all over your body, am I? Should have thought of that before you carved Hypercranial Incineration on your underboob! If you were actually a spellbook I'd keep you locked in a lead chest in a deep, dark cell!" rows.translation: 艾琳娜与伊内斯
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: "I've been wondering that myself!" Ynes pouts. "It started quite a while ago, before the Order was even made aware of Kythie's problem..." "I'm not sure she was even cursed yet. This was right during the Tycathalon's opening week." You nod. "What tipped you off?" "We'd left the city for a bit," Ynes says. "There's a river that flows through the western principality, bringing glacial melt down and feeding the baronial farms' irrigation-" "It was the first anniversary of me being appointed captain of the Order. Ynes made us a picnic, and a pie." Ynes sighs. "Yes, I decided to treat Eiri. After we were done, I took the opportunity to bathe in a waterfall near where we'd eaten. That's when I first noticed somebody watching me, hidden in the brush. I... am not ignorant of my appearance." She shifts her stance, resting the substantial heft of her breasts on the table, and swaying her voluptuous hips. "I assumed at first it was a curious farmboy, and paid it little mind." "Told me you put on a little show," Eirina says with a smirk. "Perhaps I did," Ynes admits. "It is nice to be appreciated. That ended when I heard a quilltip snap. I wasn't just being peeped on, [pc.name]. Someone was trying to copy the runes on my body. I felt helpless: I couldn't cast my spells, and my daggers were out of reach. All I could do was try and hide my body under the water and scream for Eiri." You turn towards the black-scaled salamander. "I'm guessing you didn't catch the perv?" "Ha, no. Would have saved us all a lot of hassle if I was a faster sprinter, huh? By the time I got there, the peeping tomcat was long gone. I found salamander footprints in the dirt, but Ynes didn't catch a glimpse of a flame, and having lizard feet doesn't exactly narrow down the list of suspects in Tychris by a lot." [pc.bg hunter |"The soil should have been pretty soft by a riverbank. Where did the trail lead you?" Eirina grins at you. "You've got a keen sense for these things, huh. You're right, there should have been. Whoever it was knew how to step lightly through the wilderness. |"Was there a trail for you to follow?" "Not for long." Eirina scowls. "He covered his tracks pretty well. ] But it wasn't our assassin here, I can tell you that much. No mage would trust an uneducated farmhand to transcribe arcane runes. One wrong syllable and you could turn your intestines into your out-testines. I'd bet a year's wage the perv is our man." Ynes furrows her brow. "You don't make a wage." "Shhhh. Details."
rows.translation: 我也在想这个问题！”伊内斯撅着嘴说，“这一切其实开始得很早，在‘秩序组织’还不知道凯西遇到的麻烦之前……” “我甚至不确定她当时是否真的被诅咒了。这件事发生的时候，正是泰卡塔隆节开幕的第一周。你点了点头，问道：“是什么让你察觉到这个的？” “我们之前离开城市一段时间，”伊内斯说道，“有一条河流流经西部的公国，它带来了冰川融水，为那些男爵们的农场提供了灌溉用水—— 那天正好是我被任命为‘秩序’组织队长的第一周年纪念日。Ynes为我们准备了一场野餐，还做了一个派。” Ynes叹了口气：“是啊，我决定好好犒劳一下Eiri。饭后，我趁机在我们用餐的地方附近的一处瀑布边沐浴了一会儿。 就在那时，我第一次注意到有人躲在灌木丛中注视着我。我……当然清楚自己的外貌。她调整了自己的姿势，将丰满的胸部倚在桌子上，同时摇摆着她那性感的臀部。 起初，我以为他只是个好奇的农家男孩，所以并没有太在意他。 我 你刚才表演得还挺不错的呢，”艾琳娜带着一丝笑意说道。 “也许吧，”伊内斯承认道，“被人认可的感觉确实很好。不过，当我听到羽毛笔折断的声音时，那种感觉就结束了——原来不只是有人在偷看我。 [pc.name]有人试图复制我身上的符文。我感到无能为力：既不能施展法术，手中的匕首也够不着。我只能尽量躲在水下，同时大声呼救埃里。” 你转向那只黑鳞蝾螈问道：“那么，你应该没有抓到那个变态吧？” “哈，没有。要是我跑得更快些，就能为我们省去很多麻烦了，对吧？等我赶到那里的时候，那个偷窥的混蛋早就跑得无影无踪了。我只能…… 蝾螈的足迹 虽然Ynes摔倒在泥地里，但她并没有看到有任何火焰；而且，拥有蜥蜴般的脚并不会让Tychris的嫌疑人名单缩小多少。 [pc.bg hunter |河岸边的土壤应该会相当松软才对。这条小路最终把你引向了哪里呢？” 艾琳娜对你笑了笑：“你对这些事情确实很有敏锐的洞察力，哈。你说得对，那里的土壤确实应该会是松软的。 不管那个人是谁，他显然懂得如何小心翼翼地穿越那片荒野。. |有没有什么痕迹可以让你追踪呢？” “没有持续太久。”艾琳娜皱了皱眉头，“他把自己的踪迹掩盖得相当好。 ] 但我可以肯定，那不是我们这里的刺客。没有哪个法师会信任一个没受过教育的农夫来抄写那些神秘的符文——只要一个音节抄错，你的内脏就会立刻变成你的外肠。我敢用一年的工资打赌，那个变态肯定就是我们要找的人。 伊内斯皱起了眉头：“你又没有工资可拿啊。” “嘘……细节嘛，以后再告诉你。

rows.translation: 伊妮丝的追踪者
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: "Oh, this?" Ynes taps the titanic tome in front of her. Intentionally or not, her broad hips sway from side to side. "Something from Nareva's own archive. A real privilege to hold. Or, well, behold. I don't think I could lift it if I tried." "The Order's notes say it belonged to a mountain giant," Eirina says. "Which I guess is probably just a jotun living down south? Though it would have been a pocket book to someone that big! It's been down in the dungeon for two hundred years, so the goddess is the only one who knows for sure now." You gesture past the girls. "What's it say?" "That's the question," Ynes says. "This is a book of curses. Apparently its last owner used it to hypnotize young women from a village outside his abode in Callathia, forcing them to become his brides. Any who resisted him, he would afflict with a sort of... lust madness. He meant to erode their will, make them desperate for him-" "After he cursed all the men in the village with impotence." "And let me guess, that got the Astridas' attention?" Eirina nods. "One of our fore-sisters wandered through the region and met a pair of sisters that were, well, in need in more ways than one. She follow the magic to its source, killed an evil giant, got the babes, you know how the story goes. But the spellbook ended up with us — goddess knows how she dragged it all the way to Tychris — and now I've got Ynes trying to see if she can find this lusty curse. This is the only thing in the archive that's even remotely close to what's wrong with Kythie." You nod. "If you learn how that curse works, maybe you can figure out how Kythie's works?" "It's a start," Eirina says. "What's going on with Kythie isn't a spell, but maybe there's some common threads. I want to find whoever's responsible, but maybe we can give the princess some relief in the meantime. It's worth a try."
rows.translation: 哦，这个吗？”伊内斯轻敲着面前那本厚重的典籍。不知是有意还是无意，她那宽大的臀部随之左右摇晃起来。“这是纳雷瓦自己的档案中的资料。能拿到它，真的是一种荣幸……不过，说真的，我想就算我试着去搬，也搬不动它吧。教团的记录上写着，这东西原本属于一只山巨兽，”艾琳娜说道，“我想那应该只是生活在南方的某种巨型生物吧？不过对那么大的生物来说，这个东西恐怕只是个小小的口袋而已！它已经在地牢里沉睡了两百年，所以现在只有女神才能确定它的真正来历了。你示意着让那些女孩们离开，然后问道：“上面写了什么？” “这正是问题所在，”伊内斯说道，“这是一本充满诅咒的书。据说它的最后一位主人曾用它来催眠卡拉西亚附近一个村庄里的年轻女子，迫使她们成为他的新娘。 任何反抗他的人，他都会用一种……欲望的疯狂来折磨他们。他的目的就是削弱他们的意志，让他们对他产生无法抗拒的渴望—— “在他用这种手段让村里的所有男人都丧失了性功能之后。” “那么，让我猜猜，这件事是不是引起了阿斯特里达斯的注意？艾琳娜点了点头。“我们的一位前辈曾游历过这个地区，遇到了两位姐妹……嗯，她们…… 需要帮助 从很多方面来说都是如此。她追寻魔法的源头，杀死了那个邪恶的巨人，还得到了那些美女，你知道故事的发展过程吧。但那本魔法书最终落在了我们手里——天知道她是怎么把它一路带到了提克里斯的——现在，伊内斯正在试图找出这个令人欲火中烧的诅咒的真相。这是档案中唯一可能与凯西所遭遇的问题有关的线索了。” 你点了点头：“如果你能弄清楚其中的原因…… 那个 诅咒确实有效，也许你能弄清楚凯西的那些手段是怎么回事吧？” “这至少是个开始，”艾琳娜说道，“凯西身上发生的事情并不是什么魔法作用，但或许其中存在某些共同点。我想找出幕后黑手，但与此同时，也许我们可以为公主缓解一些痛苦。值得一试。

She follow the magic to its source, killed an evil giant, got the babes, you know how the story goes. "It's a start," Eirina says. "What's going on with Kythie isn't a spell, but maybe there's some common threads. I want to find whoever's responsible, but maybe we can give the princess some relief in the meantime. It's worth a try." '

rows.translation: 伊妮丝的书
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: "I do, but I don't want to taint your half of the investigation. It's better if we both come to the same conclusions on our own." Ynes sighs and tweaks the tip of Eirina's tail. "At least share something, Eiri." The Astrida sucks a sharp breath in. "Ah, alright, fine. Something. Whoever we're dealing with is a mage with substantial experience and training. They have extensive knowledge of transmutation magic, but lack hard resources — paying an assassin with fake coinage is a gamble, and one not worth taking if you just have the cash to pay. The culprit's also a skilled alchemist, and has to have regular access to Kythie, or her immediate environs. Some curses can be cast onto a sympathetic doll or something from yonks away, but this isn't being cast like ritual magic. Kythie's having to be exposed directly, either ingested or breathed in or something like that." Eirina sits back. "The problem is motive. I know it's trite, but really, Tychris doesn't have a lot of enemies. The royal family's fairly popular with the people, and the principality hasn't gone to war in generations — expecting the occasional barbarian raid from the north. The Order's, mm, intelligence assets abroad haven't turned up any evidence of malice in our neighbors. Well, maybe with one exception..." You arch a brow. "Go on." "Maidenbridge," Ynes says. "Another city-state to the south, once a firm ally of Tychris. A few years ago, it fell under control of a warlord. Violently. Relations are tense at best. There was almost a war between the cities." "They've also refused to let the Order Astrida or the Order of the Argent Wing within their borders since," Eirina adds. "I'm sure you're not fans of that," you say. Eirina laughs. "An understatement. But we aren't about to force the issue when there's no suggestion of malfeasance. He won the city through strength of arms, not magic. Let Tira sort him out. The only reason I bring it up is that the new Count of Maidenbridge, Thore, he's actually asked after Kythie's hand in the past. He must figure a marriage would smooth things right out between the cities... and, of course, that would mean his children stand to inherit Tychris. A handy doubling of his domain." You blink. That's new information. "Tethys never mentioned." "I bet!" Ynes prods the salamander's thigh, cutting off her laughter. "Be serious, Eiri. I know it isn't likely, but there's no villainy I would put past a man with such ambitions as Count Thore. An unstable Tychris plays into his hands in any event." Looking for someone with connections to Maidensbridge couldn't hurt.
rows.translation: 我明白，但我不想影响你那部分的调查。如果我们能各自独立地得出相同的结论，那就更好了。” 伊内斯叹了口气，轻轻拨了拨艾琳娜的尾巴尖。“至少可以互相分享一下你的发现吧。 某个东西艾莉。” 阿斯特丽达猛地吸了一口凉气。“啊，好吧，没问题。 某个东西无论我们面对的是谁，他们都是一位拥有丰富经验与受过专业训练的法师。他们对转化魔法有着深入的了解，但却缺乏实质性的资源——用假币雇佣刺客其实是一种赌博，而如果你手头只有足够的现金来支付这笔费用，那么这种赌博显然并不值得进行。 这个罪魁祸首也是一名技艺高超的炼金术士，他必须能够定期接触到凯西，或者她所处的附近区域。有些诅咒虽然可以通过对某些物品施加魔法来发动，但这种诅咒的施展方式并不像仪式魔法那样。 Kythie这种物质必须通过摄入或吸入等方式直接进入人体。” Eirina靠在椅背上说道：“问题在于动机。我知道这听起来很老套，但事实上，Tychris并没有很多敌人。王室在民众中相当受欢迎，而且这个公国已经好几代人没有发动过战争了——当然，偶尔还是会遇到来自北方的野蛮人袭击。 这个组织，嗯…… 智力 在国外的那些据点并没有发现我们的邻国有任何恶意的行为。嗯，也许有一个例外……” 你挑了挑眉毛：“说说看。” “梅登布里奇，”伊内斯说道，“那是南方的一个城邦，曾经是提克里斯的坚定盟友。几年前，它被一个军阀控制了，而且是通过暴力手段。如今，两国之间的关系充其量也只能说是紧张的，差点就爆发战争了。 从那以后，他们也一直拒绝让阿斯特里达骑士团或银翼骑士团进入他们的领土，”艾琳娜补充道。 “我敢肯定，你们肯定不喜欢这样吧，”你说。 艾琳娜笑了：“这么说还轻了点。不过，既然没有证据表明他们有不当行为，我们也不打算强行要求他们改变这一决定。 他是依靠武力而非魔法赢得了这座城市。就让蒂拉来处理他吧。我之所以提到这件事，只是因为梅登布里奇的新伯爵索尔，他过去确实向凯西求婚过。他肯定认为，通过婚姻能够缓和两座城市之间的矛盾。当然，这意味着他的孩子们将能够继承泰克里斯的财产。这样一来，他的领地规模就会翻倍了。 你眨了眨眼。这可是个新信息啊。“泰西斯从来没提到过这件事。” “我敢打赌！” 伊内斯轻轻戳了戳蝾螈的大腿，让她停止了笑声。“认真点，艾莉。我知道这种可能性不大，但像托雷伯爵这样野心勃勃的人，什么事都可能做得出来。反正，一个局势不稳定的提克里斯对他来说正是绝佳的机会。 找一个与梅登斯布里奇有联系的人帮忙总没有坏处吧。.
rows.raw: ' "I do, but I don't want to taint your half of the investigation. It's better if we both come to the same conclusions on our own." Ynes sighs and tweaks the tip of Eirina's tail. "At least share something, Eiri." The Astrida sucks a sharp breath in. "Ah, alright, fine. Something. Whoever we're dealing with is a mage with substantial experience and training. They have extensive knowledge of transmutation magic, but lack hard resources — paying an assassin with fake coinage is a gamble, and one not worth taking if you just have the cash to pay. The culprit's also a skilled alchemist, and has to have regular access to Kythie, or her immediate environs. Some curses can be cast onto a sympathetic doll or something from yonks away, but this isn't being cast like ritual magic. Kythie's having to be exposed directly, either ingested or breathed in or something like that." Eirina sits back. "The problem is motive. I know it's trite, but really, Tychris doesn't have a lot of enemies. The royal family's fairly popular with the people, and the principality hasn't gone to war in generations — expecting the occasional barbarian raid from the north. The Order's, mm, intelligence assets abroad haven't turned up any evidence of malice in our neighbors. Well, maybe with one exception..." You arch a brow. "Go on." "Maidenbridge," Ynes says. "Another city-state to the south, once a firm ally of Tychris. A few years ago, it fell under control of a warlord. Violently. Relations are tense at best. There was almost a war between the cities." "They've also refused to let the Order Astrida or the Order of the Argent Wing within their borders since," Eirina adds. "I'm sure you're not fans of that," you say. Eirina laughs. "An understatement. But we aren't about to force the issue when there's no suggestion of malfeasance. He won the city through strength of arms, not magic. Let Tira sort him out. The only reason I bring it up is that the new Count of Maidenbridge, Thore, he's actually asked after Kythie's hand in the past. He must figure a marriage would smooth things right out between the cities... and, of course, that would mean his children stand to inherit Tychris. A handy doubling of his domain." You blink. That's new information. "Tethys never mentioned." "I bet!" Ynes prods the salamander's thigh, cutting off her laughter. "Be serious, Eiri. I know it isn't likely, but there's no villainy I would put past a man with such ambitions as Count Thore. An unstable Tychris plays into his hands in any event." Looking for someone with connections to Maidensbridge couldn't hurt. '

rows.translation: 刺客大师
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: "Good question," Eirina says. She jerks her thumb towards the gigantic book Ynes's face is buried in. "There was indeed. I wanted to ask for your help with our experiment here. Something to help us better understand what's happening to Kythie." [pc.ra valkyrie |"Are you sure you want a valkyrie's help?" Eirina waves her hand. "If anything, that makes me more confident in asking you. The Argent Wing and the Astrida have been allies since the Godswar; it's been yonks since I've gotten to work with one of you. And if you have Lumia's trust, you have mine too." "Good to know. So what are you two up to?" ] "I've been working to translate and adapt the curses in this tome," Ynes continues, finally straightening her back and turning to face you. That big, heart-shaped ass might not be thrust out in your face anymore, but as the witch folds her arms in front of herself, you're treated to a rare glimpse of just how buxom she is under those baggy robes. "The effect should only be temporary, the span of a few hours, but it will give Eirina a chance to study similar symptoms more closely, without Tethys's interference." [flags.YNES_TLK_DREAMLESS |You glance between the girls. "Isn't there a bit of a problem with that?" you ask. "You can't cast spells, can you?" Eirina nods. "And that's why we asked you to come down here. Ynes is going to be the victim in our little experiment. [pc.isMage |You're going to be the hexer. Between us, we should be able to manage her while we study. |I'll cast the spell, but I'll need you to help me... manage her. I can't study her and hold her down at the same time. ] "Are you okay with that, Ynes?" The thrall sighs. "If it helps Princess Kythie, I am willing. May this serve as some small penance for my many sins." |"And what do you need my help with?" "Well, the problem is... I cannot cast the spell myself, as a Dreamless," Ynes says glumly. "But [pc.isMage |you can. I will walk you through it. My knowledge of magic is, thankfully, undimmed even if my ability has been stripped. |Eirina can. ]" Eirina pats Ynes's hair. "And I'll need some help, well, managing her while she's afflicted. I can't study her if I'm having to hold her back from jumping my bones." ] "Couldn't you just, I don't know, tie her down?" The girls exchange a look. "I... yeah, I guess?" Eirina says. "Problem is, this will be the first time we cast the spell. It shouldn't be as potent as what's afflicting Kythie, but also, you've seen the damage Kythie can do, right? Ynes isn't as strong, physically, but the Order's trained her to... be very good at slipping out of places, and restraints. I'm worried she'll get free. Or worse, hurt herself in the attempt." "Besides," Ynes says, giving her mistress a thin smiles, "I am accustomed to being the one who puts others in bondage." Eirina chokes back a cough and crosses her legs. You see the front of her kilt tent a bit, before she quickly adjusts herself. "Ahem, anyway, that's the issue. I don't want Ynes to hurt herself, and for a girl that wears a collar all day, she sure doesn't like being tied up. So... it would be easier to just have some help."
rows.translation: 问得好，”艾琳娜说道。她用拇指指向了伊内斯正埋头研究的那本巨著。“确实有这样的资料。我想请你帮忙进行我们这里的实验，希望能借此更好地了解基西身上发生的事情。 [pc.ra valkyrie |你确定自己真的需要一位女武神的帮助吗？” 艾琳娜摆了摆手：“恰恰相反，正因为如此，我才更有信心向你们求助。自神战以来，银翼军团和阿斯特里达一直保持着盟友关系；而我能够与你们中的任何一方合作，也已经是很久以前的事了。既然你得到了卢米娅的信任，那么你也得到了我的信任。” “知道了。那么你们两个到底在策划什么事情呢？ ] 我一直在努力翻译并改编这本典籍中的咒语，”伊内斯继续说道，终于挺直了身子，转过身来面对你。虽然她那颗心形的大屁股不再朝你凑过来了，但当这位女巫双臂交叉在胸前时，你还是难得地看到了她那宽松长袍下究竟有多丰满。“这种效果应该只是暂时的，持续几个小时而已，但这会让艾琳娜有机会更仔细地研究类似的症状，而不会受到泰西斯的影响。 [flags.YNES_TLK_DREAMLESS |你目光在两个女孩之间来回扫视，问道：“这样不是有点问题吗？你们不能施展法术，对吧？” 艾琳娜点了点头：“正因为如此，我们才邀请你过来。在我们的这个小实验中，伊内斯将会成为实验对象。 [pc.isMage |你将会扮演那个施法者。我们两个人一起，应该能够在学习的过程中控制她。 |我会施展这个咒语，但需要你的帮助……来控制她。我无法在研究她的同时又把她固定住。 ] 你真的愿意这样做吗，伊内斯？” 那个奴隶叹了口气：“如果这能帮助凯西公主的话，我愿意。希望这能算是对我诸多罪过的小小赎罪吧。 |那么，你需要我帮忙解决什么问题呢？” “嗯，问题在于……作为一个没有梦境的人，我无法自己施展那个咒语，”伊内斯沮丧地说道，“但是…… [pc.isMage |你可以的。我会一步步指导你完成的。我的…… 知识 幸运的是，即使我的能力被剥夺了，那种魔法的力量依然没有减弱。 |艾琳娜可以。 ]艾琳娜轻抚着伊妮斯的头发，说道：“在她处于这种状态的时候，我确实需要一些帮助，来照看她。如果我总是得阻止她做出一些过激的行为，我就根本无法对她进行研究了。 ] 你就不能想办法把她绑起来吗？” 几个女孩互相对视了一眼。 “我……嗯，应该可以吧？”艾琳娜说道，“不过问题在于，这是我们第一次使用这个咒语。它的效果应该不会像那个折磨凯西的咒语那么强，不过你们也看到了凯西能造成多大的破坏，对吧？ 伊内斯在体力上并不强，但教团对她进行了特殊训练……使她非常擅长逃脱各种束缚。我担心她会逃脱控制，或者更糟的是，在尝试逃脱的过程中受伤。 “另外，”伊内斯对着自己的女主人露出一丝淡淡的微笑，“我已经习惯了将别人束缚在手中。艾琳娜强忍住咳嗽，然后交叉双腿坐了下来。 你能稍微看到她那顶用短裙材料搭建的帐篷的前面部分吗？她迅速调整了自己的状态，然后说道：“嗯，总之，问题就在这里。我不想让伊内斯受到伤害，而对于一个整天戴着项圈的女孩来说，她确实不喜欢被束缚。所以……如果有别人帮忙的话，会方便很多。

Something to help us better understand what's happening to Kythie." [pc.ra valkyrie |"Are you sure you want a valkyrie's help?" Eirina waves her hand. "If anything, that makes me more confident in asking you. The Argent Wing and the Astrida have been allies since the Godswar; it's been yonks since I've gotten to work with one of you. And if you have Lumia's trust, you have mine too." "Good to know. "Besides," Ynes says, giving her mistress a thin smiles, "I am accustomed to being the one who puts others in bondage." Eirina chokes back a cough and crosses her legs. I don't want Ynes to hurt herself, and for a girl that wears a collar all day, she sure doesn't like being tied up. So... it would be easier to just have some help." '

rows.translation: 帮助他们吧。

rows.original: Magic that makes girls uncontrollably horny? You're in.
rows.translation: 能让女孩们无法抑制地产生性欲的魔法？你找对地方了。
rows.raw: "Magic that makes girls uncontrollably horny? You're in."

rows.translation: 拒绝提供帮助

rows.original: You don't want any part in casting a curse, even if it is at the behest of a divine champion.
rows.translation: 你绝对不愿意参与施加任何诅咒，即使这是受一位神圣英雄的委托。
rows.raw: "You don't want any part in casting a curse, even if it is at the behest of a divine champion."

rows.translation: 你确定吗……？

rows.original: Is Ynes sure about this? It seems risky.
rows.translation: 伊内斯确定要这么做吗？这似乎有点冒险。
rows.raw: "Is Ynes sure about this? It seems risky."

rows.translation: 纳雷瓦是怎么想的？

rows.original: What does the goddess of magic think about her sworn blade meddling with curses?
rows.translation: 那位魔法女神，对于她的誓约之剑干涉诅咒之事，又是如何看待的呢？
rows.raw: "What does the goddess of magic think about her sworn blade meddling with curses?"

rows.translation: 艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: You shake your head. "[pc.dcb |Find somebody else to help with your curse kink, ladies. |I'm going to have to pass. |I... I'm good! I wanna leave. ]" "Damn it." Ynes slumps her shoulders. "I understand. Still, I wish you the best of luck in your investigation. The princess is a lovely girl; she doesn't deserve to suffer like this." Eirina leans back on the table and sighs. "Alright. We'll figure something out. And yeah, like she said, good luck with Kythie. I mean it. If you figure something out, make sure to tell Tethys. I'll do the same. Sisters! [pc.name] is ready to leave." The door slides open, and the pair of Astrida who escorted you down gesture for you to follow them back up.
rows.translation: 你摇了摇头。[pc.dcb |女士们，还是另找别人来帮助你们解决这个“诅咒癖好”吧。 |我恐怕得放弃了。 |我……我没事！我想走了。 ]该死。” 伊内斯垂下了肩膀：“我理解。不过，我还是祝你在调查中一切顺利。那位公主是个可爱的女孩，她不应该遭受这样的痛苦。” 艾琳娜靠在桌子上叹了口气：“好吧，我们会想出办法的。而且，就像她说的，祝你在处理凯西的事情上好运。我是真心这么希望的。如果你真的找到了解决办法…… 一定要告诉泰西斯。. 我也会这么做的。姐妹们！ [pc.name] 可以出发了。” 门缓缓打开，之前陪同你下楼的那一对阿斯特里达示意你跟他们一起回去。
rows.raw: ' You shake your head. "[pc.dcb |Find somebody else to help with your curse kink, ladies. |I'm going to have to pass. |I... I'm good! I wanna leave. ]" "Damn it." Ynes slumps her shoulders. "I understand. Still, I wish you the best of luck in your investigation. The princess is a lovely girl; she doesn't deserve to suffer like this." Eirina leans back on the table and sighs. "Alright. We'll figure something out. And yeah, like she said, good luck with Kythie. I mean it. If you figure something out, make sure to tell Tethys. I'll do the same. Sisters! [pc.name] is ready to leave." The door slides open, and the pair of Astrida who escorted you down gesture for you to follow them back up. '

rows.translation: 下一个
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: "There's no long-term risk," Ynes insists. "I have Eirina here. She can break the curse with ease." "Yeah! Believe me, breaking spells is my specialty, even among the Order. The problem with Kythie is that somebody keeps reapplying the curse, even after we dispel it. I don't plan to keep blasting Ynes with this spell." There's a moment's pause. "... Well, plan to." Ynes swats her mistress's tail.
rows.translation: 没有长期的风险，”伊内斯坚持说道，“我有艾琳娜在这里，她可以轻松解除这个诅咒。” “没错！相信我，解除魔法可是我的强项，即使在整个组织里也是这样。凯西的问题在于，总有人一直在…… 重新申请 这个诅咒，即使我们设法解除了它，它的影响依然存在。我并不打算继续用这个法术来攻击Ynes了。” 一阵短暂的沉默……“嗯， 计划 去吧。
rows.raw: ' "There's no long-term risk," Ynes insists. "I have Eirina here. She can break the curse with ease." "Yeah! Believe me, breaking spells is my specialty, even among the Order. The problem with Kythie is that somebody keeps reapplying the curse, even after we dispel it. I don't plan to keep blasting Ynes with this spell." There's a moment's pause. "... Well, plan to." Ynes swats her mistress's tail. '

rows.translation: 你确定吗……？
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: Eirina sighs. "Look, I don't want to say there's rules for thee but not for me, but..." "That's exactly how it works." Ynes says. "We keep these sorts of things under lock and key here in the temple for a reason. Destroying knowledge is as heretical as misusing it; even the darkest of magics can be used for good in the right circumstances. In this case, yeah, the spell's illegal. Incredibly so. But I have a willing subject, and we're doing it for the good of an innocent girl." [pc.isMage |You give the Astrida a suspect look. "I'm not going to get in trouble for casting this spell, right?" "Gods! No!" Eirina laughs. "This isn't some kind of entrapment thing. We don't do that. Despite what you may think, the Order Astrida spend so much more time protecting you mages than hunting you. We try to foster good magicians, not punish them just for existing. Only ones that go way off the deep end earn our ire. If you take this spell and start casting it on people all over, yeah, I'll come and hunt you down. But the whole point of being a Champion is that you're a defender of the people, right? I trust you enough to let you have a glimpse at Ynes's forbidden magic. Under strict observation." She winks. ] "So I'm not going to get divinely smited for this?" Eirina flashes you a fangy grin. "I can write you an official sanction, if you want, as the head of the Order Astrida. '[pc.name] is allowed to participate in one parentheses one dark ritual on this date at this time.' Seriously," she sighs, reaching out and putting a hand on your shoulder, "I appreciate your concern — I really do. It speaks well of you that you're hesitant. But I am the head of the Order. Short of Mother coming out of her demesne and putting her seal on this herself, my word's as good as it gets. I promise, this is fine. You won't get in trouble with me, the Order, or the goddess. This is for a good cause, we all understand." If she says so... you suppose there's no one around who can countermand her short of a god, is there?
rows.translation: 艾琳娜叹了口气：“听着，我并不是想说有些规则只适用于你而不适用于我，但是……” “事实确实如此。”伊内斯说道。 “我们把这类事情严格保密，放在神庙里，这是有原因的。破坏知识与滥用知识一样都是异端行为；即使在最黑暗的魔法中，只要使用得当，也完全可以用来做好事。在这个例子中，没错，这个咒语确实是非法的。而且是非常非法的。但是我们有自愿参与实验的对象，而且我们这样做是为了一个无辜女孩的好。 [pc.isMage |你用怀疑的目光看着阿斯特里达：“我施展这个咒语应该不会惹上麻烦吧？” “天啊！不会的！”艾琳娜笑着说，“这不是什么陷阱之类的把戏。我们不会那么做的。尽管你可能这么认为，但阿斯特里达教团其实…… 太多了 我们花费更多的时间保护你们这些法师，而不是去追捕你们。我们的目标是培养优秀的法师，而不是仅仅因为他们存在就惩罚他们。只有那些行为举止完全失控的人，才会惹怒我们。如果你使用这个法术，在到处对人们使用它，那么，我当然会来追捕你。但作为冠军，你的职责不就是保护人民吗？我足够信任你，所以允许你见识一下伊妮丝那些被禁止使用的魔法——当然，这一切都在严格的监视之下。”她眨了眨眼。 ] 这么说，我并不会因此受到神的惩罚吧？” 艾琳娜向你露出一个带着獠牙的诡异笑容：“如果你愿意的话，作为阿斯特拉达教团的团长，我可以为你出具一份正式的处罚文件。[pc.name] 在这个日期、这个时间，你是被允许参加那个黑暗仪式的。”她叹了口气，伸手搭在你的肩上，“我真的很感激你的关心，你之所以犹豫不决，反而更能体现出你的善良和体贴。但是…… 是 这个组织的领袖。除非那位女士亲自出面并亲自批准这件事，否则我的话就是最权威的保证。我承诺，这件事绝对没有问题。你不会因此而惹上我、这个组织，或者那位女神的麻烦。我们都是明白，这是为了一个正义的目的。 如果她这么说的话……我想，除了神明之外，应该没有人能够反对她的决定吧？
rows.raw: " Eirina sighs. "Look, I don't want to say there's rules for thee but not for me, but..." "That's exactly how it works." Ynes says. "We keep these sorts of things under lock and key here in the temple for a reason. Destroying knowledge is as heretical as misusing it; even the darkest of magics can be used for good in the right circumstances. In this case, yeah, the spell's illegal. Incredibly so. But I have a willing subject, and we're doing it for the good of an innocent girl." [pc.isMage |You give the Astrida a suspect look. "I'm not going to get in trouble for casting this spell, right?" "Gods! No!" Eirina laughs. "This isn't some kind of entrapment thing. We don't do that. Despite what you may think, the Order Astrida spend so much more time protecting you mages than hunting you. We try to foster good magicians, not punish them just for existing. Only ones that go way off the deep end earn our ire. If you take this spell and start casting it on people all over, yeah, I'll come and hunt you down. But the whole point of being a Champion is that you're a defender of the people, right? I trust you enough to let you have a glimpse at Ynes's forbidden magic. Under strict observation." She winks. ] "So I'm not going to get divinely smited for this?" Eirina flashes you a fangy grin. "I can write you an official sanction, if you want, as the head of the Order Astrida. '[pc.name] is allowed to participate in one parentheses one dark ritual on this date at this time.' Seriously," she sighs, reaching out and putting a hand on your shoulder, "I appreciate your concern — I really do. It speaks well of you that you're hesitant. But I am the head of the Order. Short of Mother coming out of her demesne and putting her seal on this herself, my word's as good as it gets. I promise, this is fine. You won't get in trouble with me, the Order, or the goddess. This is for a good cause, we all understand." If she says so... you suppose there's no one around who can countermand her short of a god, is there? "

rows.translation: 纳雷瓦是怎么想的？
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: The girls exchange an ecstatic look. "Alright! Let's get down to business." "Very well," Ynes says, smoothing out her black robes. "[pc.isMage |Let me walk you through the spell. It should be well within your grasp. |Eirina, let's go over the spell one more time. I know you're more fighter than caster. ]" With a grunt of effort, the curvy sorceress drags the giant-sized spellbook up to the edge of the table. "Thankfully there's no danger in me enunciating the spell in its entirety, but try not to do so yourself until we're ready to begin. I'd like a moment to prepare myself before I lose myself." "Hey, you'll be fine, Ynes," Eirina says. "[pc.isMage |[pc.name]'s an accomplished mage. [pc.HeShe] won't let you down." You nod, taking a step closer to the book. The runes inside are harsh hash-marks lashed onto tanned-hide pages in ochre-red; if someone told you it was flesh and blood, you'd hardly feel inclined to blame them. Ynes clears her throat and begins to read them, enunciating each arcane syllable clearly and slowly, tracing them with her fingers as if to emphasis each twist of her tongue. You follow along without much trouble, which if anything is a little more concerning than the book's material composition — "Why the hell is a curse like this so... so simple?" Ynes gives you an approving look. "I see Eirina took your measure well." The Astrida puffs her chest. "I am pretty good at judging mages." "Yes, indeed. That's the draw of dark magic, [pc.name]. It's seductively easy. Power at your fingertips, beyond what you might otherwise grasp. It's an easy road, a shortcut, for the low price of your immortal soul." "A good lesson to take into your campaign against the demons," Eirina says, a little more gravely now. "Their power is a slippery slope, temptation with damnation as its reward. Resist it with all your might. Victory through your own strength may be harder, may require sacrifice, but to embrace their false power is to damn yourself as well." "You're preaching again, dear," Ynes says, clicking her tongue. Eirina frowns. "It's my right as a paladin to lecture. There has to be some kind of upside to this job." "Let's go again, [pc.name]. Another recitation." And another, and another, before Ynes seems satisfied. "I've got it now," you assure her. "[pc.HeShe]'s got it!" Eirina says. "I told you [pc.heShe] was good." Ynes scoffs. "Let's see [pc.himHer] cast the spell before we pass judgement... but I am inclined to agree. A moment, then, before we begin." |You know I won't let anything happen to you. And we've got [pc.name] here to make sure you don't do anything to me." You nod. "We've got you." Ynes sighs. "Very well. Let's go over it one last time, Eiri." You peer over the girls' shoulders as they crowd around the ancient tome. The runes inside are harsh hash-marks lashed onto tanned-hide pages in ochre-red; if someone told you it was flesh and blood, you'd hardly feel inclined to blame them. Ynes clears her throat and begins to read them, enunciating each arcane syllable clearly and slowly, tracing them with her fingers as if to emphasis each twist of her tongue. Even without being a trained mage yourself, it's unsettlingly easy to follow along. You try to tell yourself that Ynes is just a talented teacher, but the fact is, for what's supposed to be dark and forbidden magic, it just... comes naturally to you? Maybe it's better not to mention that to the Astrida. After a couple more repetitions, Eirina puts her scaly hands up. "Alright, alright, Ynes. I think I've got it!" Ynes gives her an appraising look. "Are you sure?" "I am! And if, hypothetically, something does go wrong, I've got [pc.name] right here to backstop." Ynes frowns. "A moment, then, before we begin." ]
rows.translation: 两个女孩交换了一个兴奋的眼神。“好吧！我们开始吧。” “好的，”伊内斯说着，整理了一下自己的黑色长袍。[pc.isMage |让我来一步步向你解释这个法术吧。你应该能够轻松掌握它的。 |艾琳娜，我们再把这个法术复习一遍吧。我知道你更擅长战斗，而不是施法。 ]她费了九牛二虎之力，才把那本厚厚的法术书拖到桌子边缘。“幸好，完整地念出这个法术并不会带来任何危险，但在我们开始之前，你最好还是不要尝试自己念出来。我需要一些时间来做好准备，否则的话……我可能会控制不住自己。” “嘿，你一定没问题的，Ynes。”艾琳娜说道。[pc.isMage |[pc.name]他是一位技艺高超的法师。 [pc.HeShe] 绝对不会让你失望的。” 你点了点头，然后向那本书迈出了一步。书中的符文是用赭红色颜料绘制在鞣制过的皮革页面上的，那些符号看起来就像粗糙的划痕；如果有人告诉你这些符号其实是血肉之躯，你恐怕也不会觉得有什么好奇怪的。 伊内斯清了清嗓子，开始朗读这些内容，她清晰而缓慢地发出每一个晦涩难懂的音节，同时用手指逐个指着这些字，仿佛是在强调自己发音时的每一个细微变化。你毫不费力地跟了上去，但这一点反而比这本书的实际内容更令你感到困惑——“究竟为什么这样的诅咒会……这么简单吗？” 伊内斯赞许地看了你一眼：“看来艾琳娜很了解你的能力。” 阿斯特丽达挺了挺胸：“我在判断法师的能力方面确实挺在行的。” “没错，这就是黑暗魔法的魅力所在。 [pc.name]这看似轻松诱人。力量近在咫尺，超出了你通常能够掌握的范围。这是一条捷径，一个代价只是你永恒灵魂的代价罢了。” “这是你在与恶魔的斗争中应该吸取的一个教训，”艾琳娜现在的语气变得严肃了一些。 他们的力量是一条危险的道路，诱惑的背后隐藏着毁灭。你必须用尽全力去抵抗它。依靠自己的力量取得胜利或许会更加艰难，可能需要付出牺牲，但倘若屈服于他们虚假的力量，那无异于自我毁灭。你又在说教了，亲爱的，”伊内斯说着，吐了吐舌头。 艾琳娜皱起了眉头：“作为圣骑士，我有权利进行说教。这份工作总该有些好处吧。” “我们再来说一次吧…… [pc.name]再念一遍。” 然后又念了一遍，再念一遍，直到伊内斯似乎满意为止。“现在我记住了，”你向她保证。[pc.HeShe]搞定了！”艾琳娜说道，“我就说吧…… [pc.heShe] 还不错。” 英尼斯嗤之以鼻：“让我们看看吧。 [pc.himHer] 在我们下定论之前，先施展这个魔法吧……不过我倾向于同意这个建议。那么，让我们稍等片刻，再开始讨论吧。 |你知道，我绝不会让你遇到任何危险。而且，我们已经有办法了。 [pc.name] 我是来确保你不会做出任何会带来麻烦的事情的。 我你点了点头：“我们能帮到你。” 伊内斯叹了口气：“好吧，那就再最后确认一次吧，艾莉。” 你从那些女孩们的肩膀后面望去，她们正围在那本古老的典籍周围。书中的符文就像是用粗糙的工具刻在赭红色鞣制皮革上的痕迹；如果有人告诉你这些符文其实是血肉之躯，你恐怕也不会觉得有什么好奇怪的。 伊内斯清了清嗓子，开始朗读这些文字，她清晰而缓慢地发出每一个晦涩难懂的音节，同时用手指逐个指着这些字，仿佛是在强调自己发音时的每一个细微变化。即使自己并不是受过专业训练的法师，也依然能够非常轻松地跟上她的朗读节奏。 你试图告诉自己，伊内斯只不过是一位才华横溢的老师罢了，但事实是，对于那些本应属于黑暗与禁忌的魔法，你运用起来却……如此得心应手？ 或许，最好不要把这件事告诉阿斯特里达。 经过几次重复练习后，艾琳娜终于举起了她那布满鳞片的手。“好了好了，伊内斯，我想我终于掌握了！” 伊内斯仔细地打量了她一眼，问道：“你真的…… 当然可以。是的！而且，假设万一发生了什么…… 做 出了问题，我有办法解决。 [pc.name] 就在这里提供支持。” 伊内斯皱了皱眉头：“那么，在开始之前，请稍等片刻。 ]

rows.translation: 下一个
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: Ynes takes a few steps back from the stone table and its occult tome, slipping her hands down to the silver sash around her waist. You watch, spellbound, as she unties the knot and shrugs her shoulders, letting the silky black habit slip from her body and pool around her feet. Feet clad in high heels and expensive stockings that hug long, slim legs. Your eyes wander up, following the silky socks to a garter belt hugging a set of hips that the term childbearing barely does justice to, and a heart-shaped ass whose individually cheeks outsize your head. Even from behind, you can see the vast swells of her breasts from around her body, unbound by a bra; finding one to match the elegant expense of her other negligee would be a simple impossibility anywhere outside of Khor'minos. Ynes bends at the waist, slipping her panties down her legs without a hint of shame in the act, though you can hardly be expected to see her sex beneath the sheer volume of her butt. All of that, though, pales in comparison to what is on her bare body. Every single inch of Ynes's pale, freckled flesh is covered in an endless expanse of lilac ink. Tattoos are etched in her from the soles of her feet to the very nape of her neck; arm and leg, buttock and breast, even her areola were made a canvas for swirling arcane runes. Looking upon any one strand of eldritch characters more than a few passing moments makes your head swim. [pc.isMage |You see runes of evocation and illusion, glimpses of spells that would twist another's mind to your whim, implanting suggestions or deluding their perceptions; invocations that would ignite the very air with storms of fire and siroccos of razor wind. ] "Blink a few times," Eirina says, clasping your shoulder. "It's a little disorienting, huh?" Ynes turns to face you full on, letting herself move with a sultry sway wholly absent from her normal posture. "Oh, my, is the Champion hypnotized by my body?" She lifts one of her own breasts, fingers completely disappearing into herself. God, the thing looks so heavy. So soft. "I have been told I have that effect on people." She lets the boob go, and it slaps against her chest, quaking with the impact. Lilac runes ripple across her breast. Eirina wolf whistles. "Alright, alright! Let's perform some forbidden sorcery, what do you say?" Ynes takes a step closer to you, heels clattering on the cold stone, and pushes your jaw closed with a fingertip. "I say [pc.isMage |our Champion is ready. |you'd best get to it, mistress. ]
rows.translation: 伊内斯从石桌和那本充满神秘气息的典籍面前退了几步，然后将双手伸向腰间的银色腰带。你目不转睛地注视着她——她解开腰带的结，耸了耸肩，让那件丝质黑袍从身上滑落，落在自己的脚边。 脚上穿着高跟鞋和昂贵的长筒袜，这些袜子紧紧包裹着修长笔直的双腿。你的目光缓缓向上移，顺着那些丝质袜子，看到了那条紧绷在臀部上的吊带，而那臀部的大致轮廓，用“能生育”这样的词语来形容都显得远远不够；更不用说那个心形的臀部了，其两侧的肉肉简直比你的头还要大。 即使从背后看，也能清楚地看到她那毫无胸罩束缚的丰满胸部；在科尔米诺斯以外的任何地方，要想找到一件与她那件优雅精致的睡衣相配的胸罩，简直是不可能的事。 伊内斯弯下腰，将内裤从腿上滑下来，整个过程丝毫没有一丝羞耻之情——不过，鉴于她那肥硕的臀部，你几乎根本看不到她的私处。 然而，所有这些，都与接下来发生的事情相比，都显得微不足道了。 开启 她赤裸的身体。 伊内斯那苍白而布满雀斑的肌肤上，遍布着无数淡紫色的纹身。从脚底到后颈，从手臂到腿部，从臀部到胸部，甚至乳晕处，都刻满了那些神秘的符文。如果仔细端详这些符文，哪怕只是短短几秒钟，也会让人感到头晕目眩。 [pc.isMage |你看到了那些用于召唤与幻术的符文——这些符文能让你随心所欲地操控他人的思维，植入某种想法或扭曲他们的感知；也能通过这些召唤仪式，让空气本身燃起火焰风暴，或是引发锋利如刀的旋风。 ] 眨几下眼睛吧，”艾琳娜说着，握住了你的肩膀。“刚开始可能会有点让人迷失方向，对吧？” 伊内斯转过身来，完全正面地面对你，她的动作带着一种性感而慵懒的韵律，这与她平时的姿态截然不同。“哦，天哪，这位冠军是不是被我的身体迷住了？”她抬起自己的胸部，手指完全没入她的身体里……天啊，那东西看起来真是又重又柔软。“有人告诉我，我对人们会有这样的影响。” 她松开了手，那胸部…… 拍打 那力量撞击着她的胸膛，让她浑身颤抖。淡紫色的符文在她胸前闪烁着光芒。 艾琳娜吹了个口哨，说道：“好吧好吧，我们就施展一些禁忌的魔法吧，你觉得怎么样？” 伊内斯走上前一步，高跟鞋在冰冷的石面上发出清脆的声音，然后用指尖轻轻按住了你的下巴：“我同意。 [pc.isMage |我们的冠军已经准备就绪。 |你最好赶紧动手吧。 女主人；情妇. ]

rows.original:
You crack your knuckles and begin invoking the spell, just as Ynes taught you. Each syllable is a rune of power drawn from an ancient language, some debased descendant of giantish, painstakingly translated by Ynes into the arcane language of magic. 
    
    Eirina slips off the table behind you, rolling her shoulders, but otherwise leaving you to it. Seems she really does mean to let you get away with casting this hex.
    
    Your hands weave patterns in the air, tracing binding circles and hexagrams through power coalescing around your fingers, channeling it through your runes and wards and towards the tattooed woman standing nude in front of you. You might not understand the giantish language, but you do know what these words of power invoke: illusions that will bend her perceptions, cloud her mind... erode her will. Other phrases conjure emotions like desire and suppress others like shame, leaving the victim with little in the way of inhibition. And Ynes, by all accounts, had little to start with.
    
    The spell meets its mark, and finds no resistance.

Ynes moans softly, rubbing a finger around her lips, dabbing up just a little of the mess and bringing it to her mouth. "Yes, you've a fine taste, my Champion. I can see why Eirina brought you to me. Though she might struggle to pull you away from me now..." ] ] You glance at Eirina. At some point she's sat back on the table, idly rubbing at herself through her clothes. "A-any time now..." The Astrida blinks. "Oh, I broke the curse before she had your clothes all the way off." You groan. "What?" "Yeah. That's the thing. Ynes hasn't been suffering from the illusions, but you could feel how hot she was, yeah? This magic was powerful enough to cause an autonomic response. She's actually ovulating." Ynes cuts a glance towards her owner. She's still flushed, still panting, but slowly is putting herself back together. "You make it sound so clinical. Nevertheless, I apologize for the way I spoke. I completely lost control." "

rows.translation: 艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: Ynes bites her lip, giving you a very hungry look. "Really, now?" "Careful, [pc.name]," Eirina laughs. "She bites." "I might enjoy that too," you admit. "Well, well. We shall have to see for ourselves if that's really the case. As long as Eirina doesn't mind you damaging her property." Eirina laughs. "I'm more worried about you damaging [pc.name]! I might have to pay [flags.WC_CLEAR |Queen Etheryn |Baroness Revarra ] if you break her Champion. Or worse, get roped into replacing [pc.himHer]. Big shoes." "You don't even wear shoes," Ynes says, reaching down and pinching a black-scaled toe. "Well. If we're done here, I am desperately in need of a cold bath. And my, mm, collection. Come and chat in a few hours, [pc.name]. Perhaps we can further examine your... inclinations." "I'll do that," you say, helping Ynes to gather up her robes. You and Eirina work together to get her dressed again, before she slips out of the room. Eirina watches her go, eyes not leaving the sexy sway of the witch's hips until the door closes behind her. "Damn. Hey, uh, thanks. She's a handful." "Too much for you?" you ask. Eirina glances away with a shrug. "Nah, it's, uh. Look, Ynes and I... it's awkward when I literally own her. I'm told one of my dads was a Sorran priest; maybe I got a little of his faith mixed in somehow, but it feels wrong to fuck a woman that's legally my property. We flirt a lot, but... damn, y'know? Kinda hard to get it up when I'm all in my head about it. And she loves teasing me about that. Even before I made her Dreamless, Ynes's wit was sharper than my spear. Sometimes she doesn't know when to stop. But if you're into that, heh, feel free. I just want her to be happy." [pc.isDK |"As long as we won't have a problem." "We won't." |"You're awfully kind for a slaveholder." Eirina frowns. "I can't divest her, [pc.name]. She's a weapon. In the wrong hands, she's more dangerous than a demon. That magic on her body, it's Wraithborn. Horrible shit. Nareva knows, the right thing to do probably would have been to kill her, not make her Dreamless, but..." "But?" "I thought I could fix her." Eirina says it with a laugh, rubbing at her arms. "I mean, you've seen her. Felt her. I was young and horny and goddess damn, she's got huge tits. It kinda worked, too. Ynes isn't a bad person anymore. Mostly. Just... be careful with her. She's more afraid of relapsing than I am." ] Eirina sighs. "Anyway, let's talk shop instead, huh?" She slaps your shoulder. "We've definitely learned something important. The magic is tricking the body, not actually afflicting it with a transmutation." You nod. "Does that narrow down your list of suspects?" "It does," Eirina says with a smirk. "Down to two, and I'm pretty strongly leaning towards... well, you'll see. Go and speak to Lady Tethys when you're sure, yourself. Hopefully we'll be fingering the same villain." "And if not?" Eirina shrugs. "I'm sure Tethys will make a judgement call. And if we're wrong, well, Kythie pays the price. So let's not fuck it up, huh?" "Right." Eirina gives you a thumbs up and then whistles at the door. It opens, and the two Astrida that escorted you down take you back to the temple sanctuary.
rows.translation: 伊内斯咬了咬嘴唇，露出一种非常饿的眼神。“真的吗，现在就要吃？” “小心点…… [pc.name]埃琳娜笑着说：‘她会咬人的。’” “我可能也会喜欢那样的……”你承认道。 “嗯，那我们就得亲自试试看才行。只要埃琳娜不介意你弄坏她的东西……” 埃琳娜笑了：“我倒更担心你会弄坏…… [pc.name]! 我可能得付钱了。 [flags.WC_CLEAR |艾瑟琳女王 |雷瓦拉女男爵 ] 如果你毁掉了她的英雄角色，或者更糟的是，被迫去替换它的话…… [pc.himHer]真是大话连篇啊。” “你自己根本就不穿鞋呢，”伊内斯说着，伸手捏了捏他那颗长着黑色鳞片的脚趾。“好吧，如果我们在这里的事情都办完了，我真的急需洗个冷水澡……还有，嗯…… 收藏品几个小时后再来聊吧。 [pc.name]或许我们可以进一步了解你的……兴趣所在。” “我会的，”你说道，同时帮助伊内斯整理她的长袍。你和艾琳娜一起帮她重新穿好衣服，然后她便悄悄地离开了房间。 艾琳娜目送她离去，目光始终紧盯着那位女巫那性感的臀部摆动，直到门在她身后关上。“该死……嘿，谢谢你。她可真是个难对付的人。” “对你来说太难对付了吗？”你问道。 艾琳娜耸了耸肩，然后将视线移开了。 不行，呃……你看，我和伊内斯之间的关系……当我实际上拥有她的所有权时，这种关系就会变得很尴尬。有人告诉我，我的一位父亲曾是索兰教会的牧师；也许我的血液里流淌着他的信仰，但和一位在法律上属于我的女人发生关系，总觉得有点不对劲。 我们经常互相调情，但是……该死，你懂我的意思吧？当我满脑子都在想这件事的时候，真的很难进入状态。而她…… 喜爱 总拿这件事来取笑我。甚至在我创造出“Dreamless”之前，Ynes的机智就已经比我的长矛还要锋利了。有时候她根本不知道该什么时候停下来……不过如果你喜欢这样，呵呵，那就随你吧。我只是希望她能够开心而已。 [pc.isDK |只要我们不会遇到问题就行。” “我们肯定不会的。 |对于一个奴隶主来说，你未免太善良了。” 艾琳娜皱起了眉头：“我无法剥夺她的这些财产。 [pc.name]她就是一件武器。如果落入坏人之手，她会比恶魔还要危险。她身上的那种魔法，属于“幽魂族”。真是可怕的玩意儿……纳雷瓦心里明白，正确的做法可能是杀了她，而不是让她陷入“无梦状态”，但是……但是？” “我以为自己能够改变她。”艾琳娜笑着说道，一边揉着自己的手臂。“我的意思是，你们都见过她，也感受过她的魅力。我当时还年轻，充满欲望，而且，她的胸部确实非常诱人……某种程度上，我的方法确实奏效了。 伊内斯已经不再是个坏人了。至少大部分时间里是这样。不过……还是要小心她。她比我更害怕故态复萌。 ] 艾琳娜叹了口气：“总之，我们还是谈谈工作吧？”她拍了拍你的肩膀，“我们肯定学到了一些重要的东西。 这种魔法只是欺骗了人的感官，实际上并不会真正导致身体发生任何变化。你点了点头。“这样你的嫌疑名单就缩小了吗？” “是的，”艾琳娜笑着说，“只剩下两个人了，而且我相当确信其中一个是……嗯，等你亲自去和泰西斯女士谈过之后，你就会明白的。 希望我们最终能联手对付同一个反派。” “要是做不到呢？” 艾琳娜耸了耸肩：“我相信泰西斯会做出正确的判断。而如果我们搞错了，嗯，代价就会由凯西来承担。所以，我们千万不能搞砸，好吗？ 好的。” 艾琳娜向你竖起了大拇指，然后对着门吹了一声口哨。门应声而开，之前陪同你下来的那两个阿斯特里达将你带回了神庙的圣所。

rows.translation: 下一个
艾琳娜与伊内斯

rows.original: Ynes winces. "Yes, well, my apologies. And thank you for your help. I am not sure what I'd have done if only Eirina was here." "Why did you jump me and not her?" "Why, indeed?" Ynes chuckles. "The new experience is always more thrilling, I suppose. I know what Eirina is capable of. I suppose I sought greener pastures." Eirina snort-laughs. "Damn, Ynes. That almost hurt." "Please." Ynes rolls her eyes. "As if you lack for partners that fawn over you. I am a mean, heartless bitch deep down. You hardly need to feel insecure because I berate you. I hope neither of you take it personally. Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to... to tend to my own needs for a few hours more." The slave-girl gathers up her robes and knocks on the door. Eirina watches her go, biting her lip at the witch's seductive gait. "Hell of a woman, huh? I'm glad she got the chance to let loose. Sorry you didn't, uh, like her style." She hops off the table and rolls her shoulders. "Listen, though, now we know for sure how this works. The magic is tricking the body, not actually afflicting it with a transmutation." You nod. "Does that narrow down your list of suspects?" "It does," Eirina says with a smirk. "Down to two, and I'm pretty strongly leaning towards... well, you'll see. Go and speak to Lady Tethys when you're sure, yourself. Hopefully we'll be fingering the same villain." "And if not?" Eirina shrugs. "I'm sure Tethys will make a judgement call. And if we're wrong, well, Kythie pays the price. So let's not fuck it up, huh?" "Right," you say, taking an offered hand and letting the Astrida peel you off the floor. Eirina gives you a thumbs up and then whistles at the door. It opens, and the two Astrida that escorted you down take you back to the temple sanctuary.
rows.translation: 伊内斯皱了皱眉头：“嗯，实在是对不起。也感谢你的帮助。如果艾琳娜在这里的话，我真不知道自己该怎么办了。” “为什么…… 做了 你选择跳过我而不是她？” “嗯，为什么呢？”伊内斯轻笑道，“新的体验总是更令人兴奋吧。我知道艾琳娜的能力……我想，我只是想要寻找更好的机会罢了。” 艾琳娜发出一阵嗤笑。 该死，Ynes。你刚才差点让我受伤呢。” “求你了。”Ynes翻了个白眼，“你好像缺那些对你阿谀奉承的人似的。其实我内心深处是个刻薄无情的泼妇。我骂你，根本不是因为担心你会缺乏追求者。希望你们俩都别往心里去。 现在，如果你们不介意的话，我需要再忙上几个小时，去处理一些自己的事情。” 那个女奴隶收拾好她的长袍，然后敲响了门。艾琳娜看着她离开，不禁咬住了嘴唇——那个女巫那诱人的步伐实在让人无法忽视。 真是个了不起的女人，嗯？我很高兴她有机会尽情释放自己的活力。可惜你不太喜欢她的风格吧。”她从桌子上跳下来，耸了耸肩。“不过，现在我们终于弄清楚了事情的来龙去脉。 这种魔法只是欺骗了人的感官，实际上并不会对人的身体产生任何实质性的变化。你点了点头。“这样你的嫌疑人名单就缩小了吗？” “是的，”艾琳娜笑着说，“只剩下两个人了，而且我相当确信其中一个是……嗯，等你确定了再自己去和泰西斯女士谈谈吧。 希望我们最终能联手对付同一个反派。” “要是做不到呢？” 艾琳娜耸了耸肩：“我相信泰西斯会做出正确的判断。而如果我们搞错了，嗯，代价就会由凯西来承担。所以，我们千万不能搞砸，好吗？ 好吧，”你说道，接过别人伸来的手，让阿斯特拉达帮你从地上站起来。 艾琳娜朝你竖起了大拇指，然后朝门口吹了声口哨。门应声而开，之前陪你下楼的那两个阿斯特拉达又将你带回了神庙的圣所。

rows.original:
"Oh, [pc.name]!" River chirps as you pass by, hopping up from where he'd been strumming. "I've got a message for you. Big 'mander lass just dropped it off a couple of hours ago, in fact."
    
    "Big 'mander?" you echo. [vitra.met
        |Vitra? But she's all the way in Khor'minos...
    ]
    
    "Biggest frostscale salamander I've ever seen," he nods. "[var0
        | Present company excluded, anyway.
    ] A warrior born if I've ever seen one. Here."
    
    You take the missive from River when he offers it up and unfurl it. Even without reading a word, you can tell whoever sent this has money to spare: the kitten-bard's handed you a roll of the softest vellum you've ever handled, rolled up around a gold-etched baton. The handwriting is laid out thick and bold, as if with a paintbrush rather than quill, though the characters look somewhat more rounded and compact than most Belharan scripts you're familiar with. 
    
    It reads: "Hail, Champion of [var1],
    
    The tales of your exploits have spread far and wide, across even the great Greyvale Mountains where they have captivated the court of the humble realm of Tychris. It is in light of such astounding feats that the His Most Serene Highness Prince Evander extends his invitation to yourself and your companions to visit the principality and its grand palace, that you might grace the royal court with a personal recounting of your deeds whilst enjoying His Highness's most generous hospitality. There is much opportunity to be found for a champion of your accomplishments within our borders.
    
    For your convenience, a carriage has been dispatched to the caravanserai in the north-west of Hawkstone Barony's fertile valley, and will wait at your pleasure to convey you across the mountains to the Principality of Tychris.
    
    With deepest respect,
    Magister Vasko, Chancellor of the Royal Library"
    
    A royal invitation, huh? You [pc.dcb
        |give River an upnod
        |thank River
        |give River a big hug
    ] for delivering the missive and stow it in your pack. Might be worth checking out...
    
    [var2
        |"Tychris, huh?" Cait chimes in, peering over your shoulder. "They're supposed to have one of the most impressive libraries in the world. If there's anywhere in the world I can find out more about portals, it would be there. Please, [pc.name], if you're thinking about going — take me with you!"
    ]
rows.translation:
哦， [pc.name]河流在你经过时发出潺潺的声响，那只鸟从它之前停留的地方跳了起来。‘有个消息要告诉你，事实上，是那位大指挥官的女士几小时前留下的。’”

“大指挥官的女士？”你重复道。 [vitra.met
        |维特拉？可她现在应该在霍尔米诺斯啊……
    ]
    
    这是我见过的最大的霜鳞蝾螈，”他点了点头说道。[var0
        | 当然，现在在场的这些人除外。
    ] 这才是我见过的真正的勇士啊。”你从River手中接过信件，展开它。即使不读内容，你也立刻能看出：寄信人一定很有钱——这位吟游诗人送给你的，是一卷迄今为止你用过最柔软的羊皮纸，纸条被卷在一条刻有黄金图案的权杖上。 字迹粗犷有力，看起来更像是用画笔而非羽毛笔书写而成的，不过这些字符确实比你熟悉的大多数贝尔哈兰文字更加圆润、紧凑。

上面写着：“致敬，冠军…… [var1]你那些英勇事迹的故事已经传遍了四面八方，甚至传到了遥远的灰谷山脉，还在提克里斯这个宁静王国的宫廷里引起了人们的极大兴趣。正因如此，埃万德王子殿下特邀你和你的同伴们前往他的公国，参观那座宏伟的宫殿。在那里，你们可以亲自向王室成员讲述自己的冒险经历，同时享受王子殿下慷慨提供的款待。 在我们这片土地上，绝对有机会让那些认可你成就的人看到你的价值。

为了方便你的行程，我们已经派了一辆马车前往霍克斯通男爵领地肥沃山谷中的商队旅馆，那辆马车会随时等候你的到来，带你翻越群山，前往蒂克里斯公国。
    
    致以最崇高的敬意，  
皇家图书馆馆长瓦斯科大师

一份皇家邀请函，啊？你…… [pc.dcb
        |向River点头表示认可。
        |感谢河神
        |紧紧拥抱River一下
    ] 用来传递这条消息，然后把它放进你的背包里。或许值得一试……
    
    [var2
        |提克里斯，是吗？”凯特凑过来，从你肩膀后面望去，“据说他们拥有世界上最为丰富的图书馆之一。如果世界上有什么地方能让我了解更多关于传送门的信息，那肯定就是那里了。拜托了…… [pc.name]如果你正在考虑去的话——带上我吧！
    ]

    ] A warrior born if I've ever seen one. Here."
    
    You take the missive from River when he offers it up and unfurl it. Even without reading a word, you can tell whoever sent this has money to spare: the kitten-bard's handed you a roll of the softest vellum you've ever handled, rolled up around a gold-etched baton. The handwriting is laid out thick and bold, as if with a paintbrush rather than quill, though the characters look somewhat more rounded and compact than most Belharan scripts you're familiar with. 
    
    It reads: "Hail, Champion of [var1],
    
    The tales of your exploits have spread far and wide, across even the great Greyvale Mountains where they have captivated the court of the humble realm of Tychris. It is in light of such astounding feats that the His Most Serene Highness Prince Evander extends his invitation to yourself and your companions to visit the principality and its grand palace, that you might grace the royal court with a personal recounting of your deeds whilst enjoying His Highness's most generous hospitality. There is much opportunity to be found for a champion of your accomplishments within our borders.
    
    For your convenience, a carriage has been dispatched to the caravanserai in the north-west of Hawkstone Barony's fertile valley, and will wait at your pleasure to convey you across the mountains to the Principality of Tychris.
    
    With deepest respect,
    Magister Vasko, Chancellor of the Royal Library"
    
    A royal invitation, huh? You [pc.dcb
        |give River an upnod
        |thank River
        |give River a big hug
    ] for delivering the missive and stow it in your pack. Might be worth checking out...
    
    [var2
        |"Tychris, huh?" Cait chimes in, peering over your shoulder. "They're supposed to have one of the most impressive libraries in the world. If there's anywhere in the world I can find out more about portals, it would be there. Please, [pc.name], if you're thinking about going — take me with you!"
    ]
    
    "

rows.original: A horse-drawn carriage is waiting for you here, just as the letter from Tychris described. A tall, statuesque salamander woman is leaning against one of the wooden wheels, one hand on a bronze saber at her hip and the other holding a long, thin pipe.
rows.translation: 正如提克里斯在信中描述的那样，一辆马车正在这里等着你。一位身材高挑、姿态优雅的女性正倚靠在木轮上，一只手放在腰间的青铜剑上，另一只手则拿着一根细长的烟管。

rows.original: Approach the coachwoman and see what she has to say.
rows.translation: 去找那位女教练，看看她有什么要说的。
rows.raw: "Approach the coachwoman and see what she has to say."

rows.original:
[flags.P_DILEMMA_CARRIAGE
        |"[pc.name]," Captain Tyna says coolly, pushing herself up to a standing position beside the driver's seat of her carriage. "Are you ready to depart yet? We've got a bit of a ride ahead of us, and the royal family's been really looking forward to your arrival."
        |As [party.yall] make your way into the ruins' courtyard, the tall salamander woman pushes herself off the carriage wheel and takes a step towards you, hand lingering on the saber at her hip. River wasn't kidding — she's certainly a big girl, towering just over seven feet tall and wearing barely anything save a short kilt and bustier. Her bare limbs are covered in smooth cyan scales, and she's got more than her share of muscle and scars both. A lengthy lizard-tail sweeps across the ground behind her, its tip flickering with an auroran light amidst the overgrown weeds at her bare feet. 
        
        "So, you're the Champion everyone's talking about," the woman says evenly, looking you up and down. The [flags.WC_CLEAR
            |boreal elves' diplomat spoke highly of you indeed."
            
            [party.has ryn
                |Etheryn glances at you, ears wiggling in delight.
            ]
            |baroness of Hawkethorne made you out to be quite the hero."
        ] The salamander nods approvingly, sliding her hand from her sword hilt to hooking a thumb through her belt. "I'm Tyna, Captain of the Guard for the Principality of Tychris. The royal family are more eager to meet you, [pc.name], than anyone I've ever escorted before. It's a bit of a trek across the Greyvales, and even more dangerous than usual these days, so I've been commanded to come and make sure you reach the city safe and sound. Assuming you're coming, that is?"
    ]
rows.translation:
[flags.P_DILEMMA_CARRIAGE
        |"[pc.name]泰娜队长冷静地说道，一边从马车的驾驶座旁站起身来。‘你们准备好了出发吗？前方的路还有些长，而王室成员们都非常期待你们的到来。
        |正如……所言 [party.yall] 当你走进废墟中的庭院时，那个高个子的蝾螈女从马车的轮子上站起来，朝你走了过来，手还搭在腰间的剑上。River确实没有开玩笑——她确实是个高个子女人，身高足有七英尺以上，身上几乎只穿着一条短裙和一件紧身上衣。 她裸露的四肢上覆盖着光滑的青色鳞片，身上也布满了肌肉与疤痕。一条长长的蜥蜴尾巴在她的身后拖地而行，尾巴的末端在杂草丛中闪烁着微弱的光芒。 
        
        所以，你就是大家口中所说的那位冠军吧，”那个女人平静地说道，上下打量着你。 [flags.WC_CLEAR
            |北境精灵的外交官确实对你评价很高。
            
            [party.has ryn
                |埃瑟琳高兴地望着你，耳朵还不停地动着。
            ]
            |霍克索恩男爵夫人把你描绘成了一个真正的英雄呢。
        ] 蝾螈赞许地点了点头，将手从剑柄上拿开，用拇指勾住了腰带。“我是蒂娜，提克里斯公国的卫队队长。王室成员们都非常渴望见到你。 [pc.name]比我以前护送过的任何人都更值得这个责任。穿过格雷瓦尔斯地区需要一段漫长的路程，而这些天那里的安全状况也比平时更加危险，因此我被命令来确保你们能够安全抵达城市。当然，前提是你们真的会来，对吧？
    ]

rows.original: Let the Guard-Captain ferry you across the mountains to the city of Tychris. This will take a few days...
rows.translation: 让卫队队长带你翻越群山，前往提克里斯城吧。 这需要几天的时间……
rows.raw: "Let the Guard-Captain ferry you across the mountains to the city of Tychris. This will take a few days..."

rows.translation: 现在不行。

rows.original: You need some time before you're ready to go to Tychris.
rows.translation: 在你准备好前往提克里斯之前，还需要一些时间。
rows.raw: "You need some time before you're ready to go to Tychris."

rows.original:
"Not yet," you say, stepping back.
    
    Captain Tyna shrugs. "Fine. I'll be camped out here 'till you're ready."
    
    With that, she leans back against the wheel of the cart and pulls out a pipe.
rows.translation:
还没准备好，”你边说边后退了几步。

泰娜队长耸了耸肩：“好吧，那我就在这里等着你准备好。”

说完，她靠在马车的轮子上，掏出了一支烟斗。

    With that, she leans back against the wheel of the cart and pulls out a pipe.
    '

rows.original: [party.som |"Ready," you affirm, heading towards the coach door. |"You ready?" you ask [companion.name], heading towards the coach door. |"Ready, everyone?" you ask your friends, starting towards the coach door. ] [party.has cait |"I am so ready to finally see Tychris!" Cait cheers, practically barreling you over to hop in. "I am going to just lose myself in the library!" ] [party.has arona |Arona grunts in annoyance. "Fuck, it's gonna take days to get over those mountains. [arona.isDom |Well, at least I'll have my favorite cock-warmer to keep me entertained on the way." Tyna glances between you and the orc, slowly raising an eyebrow. |Hrm, at least we're not lugging longboats on our shoulders this time."[arona.fucked | You're sure you can find some way to keep Arona's idle hands busy on the journey. ] ] ] [party.has brint |Brint looks at the coach in dismay. "I'm gonna be hunched over for how long?" ] "Alright," Tyna says, hauling herself up into the driver's seat and taking the reins. "All aboard. And keep an eye out the windows. Like I said, it's been dangerous on the road lately." You climb in and take a seat, ready for a long and, hopefully, boring trip over the mountains...

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original: Three days later... The Greyvale Mountains pass you by in stately majesty, their slate-gray peaks earning their name beneath caps of white snow and sporadic clumps of evergreen trees. The old road winds through the valleys and across wind-swept mountainsides, sometimes so narrow that a wheel comes inches from spinning off into the air, or grinding against sheer stone. Captain Tyna's an excellent driver, at least, steering you through the twisting paths with level-headed skill. You see the city just before sundown. The day is spent watching the craggy rock giving way to rolling green hills and farmland dotted with homesteads. Blue-scaled salamanders stare on with curiosity from porches and vegetable patches, but Captain Tyna's presence keeps them from asking any questions — she just waves them off and assures any that wander close that everything's alright. You're friends visiting from Hawkethorne, nothing to worry about. Eventually, the fields end against mighty stone walls, taller than any you've seen elsewhere in the Marches. Towers rise from it every hundred paces, bristling with arrow-slits; the gates are wide enough for a dozen men to match through abreast, but they stand open in invitation. Tyna nods to the soldiers guarding it — only half so scantily clad as their travelling captain, clad up in breastplates and plumed helms. They snap crisp salutes as Tyna drives you through and into the city proper. And a city it truly is! The paved streets are flanked by tan brick homes and businesses with tall tiled roofs and colorful shutters over their window. The occasional curious glance you got on the road becomes a growing throng around you. It seems your exploits have reached more ears than just the royal court's... The ice-cold captain commands them to keep out of your way, driving steadily towards the heart of the city. The crowd parts... and reforms behind you, forming an impromptu procession all the way to the second ring of walls surrounding the palace grounds. The pace of your carriage grinds to a crawl in the midst of such a press of bodies. You're a curiosity, a wonder, to these people. Something so out of place that folk are coming out of their homes from streets away just to see you. Little children run alongside you, waving scaly arms and technicolor tail-flames. "Popular [pc.mf |guy |lady ], aren't we?" Tyna says. "Try not to disappoint them." [pc.isCunning |"No pressure, right?" |You gulp. ] By the time the gates close heavily behind you, separating you from the crowd, it's past dark. Tyna breathes a sigh of relief as she clambers down from the carriage. She sweeps an arm up the paved path ahead, leading to a broad structure of marble and brick that crowns the hilltop in the middle of the city with a single great tower at its center. The whole place is perhaps three times the breadth of Castle Hawkstone back home, though far less imposing in its architecture — it looks more like a temple than a fortress, open and inviting to the public. At least, you suppose, when there isn't a huge crowd trying to see the hero of the hour.
rows.translation: 三天后…… 格雷维尔山脉以雄伟壮丽的姿态从你身旁掠过，那些板岩灰色的山峰在白雪的覆盖下以及零星分布的常绿树木的映衬下，更加显得气势磅礴。这条古老的道路蜿蜒穿过山谷，越过被风侵蚀的山坡，有时道路狭窄到极点，车轮几乎要悬空飞出路面，或者与陡峭的岩石擦肩而过。不过，泰娜船长驾驶技术娴熟，她冷静而熟练地引导车辆穿行在这些曲折的小路上。 你在日落前看到了这座城市。 一整天，你都在观察那些崎岖的岩石如何逐渐让位于连绵的绿丘以及散布着农舍的农田。蓝鳞蝾螈们从门廊和菜园里好奇地注视着你，但蒂娜船长的出现让它们不敢发出任何疑问——她只是向它们挥了挥手，向那些靠近她的蝾螈们保证一切都很安全。你们只是来自霍克索恩的朋友们，没什么好担心的。 最终，那些田野在巍峨的石墙前终结了——这些石墙比你在边境地区见过的任何石墙都要高耸。每隔一百步，就会有一座塔楼耸立在那里，塔墙上布满了箭孔；城门宽大到足以让十几名士兵并排通过，而且它们此刻大开着，仿佛在热情地邀请人们进入。泰娜向守卫城门的士兵们点了点头——这些士兵的装备远没有他们的队长那么精良，只穿着胸甲，头戴羽毛装饰的头盔。当泰娜带你穿过城门进入城市时，这些士兵整齐地向她敬礼。 这确实是一座城市！铺砌的街道两旁是棕褐色的砖房，各种商铺的屋顶都覆盖着高高的瓷砖，窗户上还装有色彩鲜艳的百叶窗。在路上偶尔会遇到的那些好奇的目光，渐渐汇聚成了围绕在你周围的众多人群。看来，你的冒险事迹已经传到了不仅仅是宫廷里的人耳中…… 那位冷若冰霜的队长命令他们让开道路，自己则径直朝城市的中心驶去。人群纷纷退开……然后在你的身后重新聚拢起来，形成一支临时组成的队伍，一路跟随你，直到那环绕宫殿地界的第二道城墙。 在如此密集的人群中，你的马车前进的速度简直慢得像爬行一样。对这些人来说，你就是一个奇观，一个奇迹——如此与众不同，以至于人们会从几条街之外赶来， just为了看看你。 小孩子们跟在你身边奔跑，他们挥动着布满鳞片的胳膊，尾巴上还闪烁着五颜六色的火焰。 受欢迎 [pc.mf |伙计 |女士 ]不是吗？”泰娜说道，“尽量别让他们失望吧。 [pc.isCunning |没压力吧？ |你咽了口唾沫。 ] 当大门在身后重重关上，将你与人群隔开时，天已经完全黑了。蒂娜从马车上下来，长舒了一口气。她顺着前方铺好的小路走去，那条路通向一座由大理石和砖块建造的宏伟建筑——这座建筑矗立在城市的中心，山顶上有一座高大的塔楼。 这个地方的范围大概是家乡霍克斯通城堡的三倍，但其建筑风格远没有那么雄伟壮观——它看起来更像一座寺庙，而非堡垒，对公众而言显得开放而亲切。当然，至少在没有人群挤来挤去试图一睹这位当红英雄的风采时才是这样。
