rows.translation: 关于他自己

rows.original: Ask Vasko to tell you a little bit about himself. Your initial meeting was rather brusque, after all.
rows.translation: 让瓦斯科跟你讲讲他自己吧。毕竟，你们最初的见面方式相当生硬。
rows.raw: "Ask Vasko to tell you a little bit about himself. Your initial meeting was rather brusque, after all."

rows.translation: 成为大师
成为大师

rows.original: How did Vasko end up in this position of high influence?
rows.translation: 瓦斯科是如何走到如今这个拥有如此大影响力的位置的呢？
rows.raw: "How did Vasko end up in this position of high influence?"

rows.translation: 关于凯西的诅咒

rows.original: What does Vasko know about the princess's dilemma?
rows.translation: 瓦斯科对公主面临的困境了解多少呢？
rows.raw: "What does Vasko know about the princess's dilemma?"

rows.translation: 提克里斯的现状

rows.original: So how are things in the principality, outside the palace?
rows.translation: 那么，在王宫之外，这个公国的情况究竟如何呢？
rows.raw: "So how are things in the principality, outside the palace?"

rows.translation: 镇上的其他法师们

rows.original: Are there any other noteworthy magicians in the city? Does Vasko have any real competition?
rows.translation: 这座城市里还有其他值得注意的魔术师吗？瓦斯科真的有竞争对手吗？
rows.raw: "Are there any other noteworthy magicians in the city? Does Vasko have any real competition?"

rows.translation: 窗口视图

rows.original: Vasko's one of the only people in the palace who keeps his window open, and his office is right above Kythie's favorite tree. Did he see something that night?
rows.translation: 瓦斯科是宫殿里为数不多会打开窗户的人之一，他的办公室正好位于凯西最喜欢的那棵树的正上方。那么，那个夜晚他是否看到了什么呢？
rows.raw: "Vasko's one of the only people in the palace who keeps his window open, and his office is right above Kythie's favorite tree. Did he see something that night?"

rows.translation: 关系吗？

rows.original: You've slept together, but what does that mean to Vasko?
rows.translation: 你们虽然一起睡过，但这对瓦斯科来说意味着什么呢？
rows.raw: "You've slept together, but what does that mean to Vasko?"

rows.translation: 返回

rows.original: The words have barely left your mouth before Vasko's rolling his eyes. "Really? [kythie.isCursed |Our princess is cursed, and you're bothering me with small talk? |Must you? ]" He sighs. "Do you have nothing better to do, Champion?" [pc.dcb |"Somebody's touchy," you grumble. |"Surely you can spare a minute or two? I'd just like to get to know you." |"Aww, come on. Please?" you ask, giving him the puppy-dog eyes. ] Vasko throws his hands up. "What do you want from me? I'm the damned court magister: I cast spells for a living. "Well, how did you get this job?" you ask. It's like pulling teeth with [pc.isDK |this fucking nerd |this guy ]. "Many, many, many years of hard work. Unlike most of the people in this palace I wasn't born into the role... but I see you picked up on that, or why would you have asked?" He sighs. [pc.isCunning |And he's got a complex about it, excellent. ]"So you feel like you stand out a little?" "A little, oh, yes. Just a bit. A skosh." Vasko leans against his work table, scruffy blue hair fringing his face. "I am sure the highborn of the court are constantly asking themselves how the poor farmboy wormed his way into the palace. They certainly do little to disguise their jealousy that I have the princep's ear more readily than they." He snorts. "I'm sorry, what was the point of this inquest again?" [vasko.fucked |You put a hand on his shoulder. "I just wanted to get to know you a little better..." He bristles a moment, then sighs. "I'm sorry. You understand, I don't like to speak about myself here. The nobles look down on me just because I wasn't born in the city walls. Those bastards look down on anyone whose somethings-great grandfather wasn't taking it up the ass from Prince Philandros during the Godswar! This city is so mired in hidebound traditionalism that it can't recognize talent — and it hates it when talent surfaces anyway." |You put your hands up. "Just trying to talk." "Yes, well, let's keep our talk to matters of import. My business is none of yours, Champion." ]
rows.translation: 话音刚落，瓦斯科就翻了个白眼：“真的吗？ [kythie.isCursed |我们的公主被诅咒了，你却还在跟我闲聊些无聊的事情？ |非得这样吗？ ]他叹了口气，说道：‘冠军，你就没有别的事情好做吗？ [pc.dcb |有人太敏感了，”你抱怨道。 |您肯定能抽出一两分钟的时间吧？我只是想了解一下您的情况。 |哎呀，求你了嘛？”你用那种楚楚可怜的眼神看着他说道。 ] 瓦斯科双手一摊，说道：“你们到底想从我这里得到什么？我不过是个该死的宫廷法师罢了，靠施法为生而已。 “那么，你们到底…… 获得 这份工作真的值得吗？”你问道。这简直就像拔牙一样痛苦…… [pc.isDK |这个该死的书呆子 |这家伙 ]很多，非常多…… 很多 多年的努力。与这座宫殿里的大多数人不同，我并不是天生就适合这个职位的……不过你似乎注意到了这一点，否则你也不会提出这样的问题吧？”他叹了口气说道。 [pc.isCunning |而且他对此还有一种心理障碍。太棒了。 ]所以你觉得自己有点与众不同吧？” “嗯，有一点吧。只是稍微有点而已。”瓦斯科靠在办公桌上，凌乱的蓝色头发垂在脸上。“我敢肯定，宫廷里的那些贵族们肯定一直在想，这个穷苦的农夫究竟是怎么混进皇宫的。他们肯定也暗自嫉妒，因为我比他们更容易得到王子的青睐。” 他哼了一声，“抱歉，不过这次询问到底有什么意义呢？ [vasko.fucked |你把手放在他的肩上：“我只是想更深入地了解你一些而已……” 他愣了一下，然后叹了口气：“对不起。你明白的，我并不喜欢在这里谈论自己。那些贵族只是因为我没有出生在城墙内，就看不起我。 那些混蛋根本看不起那些祖先在神战时期没有得到菲兰德罗斯王子的青睐的人！这座城市被顽固的传统主义所束缚，根本无法识别真正的才华——而且，每当有才华的人出现时，它反而会憎恶他们。" |你举起了手。“只是想谈谈而已。” “好吧，那我们就谈谈重要的事情吧。我的事情与你无关，冠军。 ]
rows.raw: ' The words have barely left your mouth before Vasko's rolling his eyes. "Really? [kythie.isCursed |Our princess is cursed, and you're bothering me with small talk? |Must you? ]" He sighs. "Do you have nothing better to do, Champion?" [pc.dcb |"Somebody's touchy," you grumble. |"Surely you can spare a minute or two? I'd just like to get to know you." |"Aww, come on. Please?" you ask, giving him the puppy-dog eyes. ] Vasko throws his hands up. "What do you want from me? I'm the damned court magister: I cast spells for a living. "Well, how did you get this job?" you ask. It's like pulling teeth with [pc.isDK |this fucking nerd |this guy ]. "Many, many, many years of hard work. Unlike most of the people in this palace I wasn't born into the role... but I see you picked up on that, or why would you have asked?" He sighs. [pc.isCunning |And he's got a complex about it, excellent. ]"So you feel like you stand out a little?" "A little, oh, yes. Just a bit. A skosh." Vasko leans against his work table, scruffy blue hair fringing his face. "I am sure the highborn of the court are constantly asking themselves how the poor farmboy wormed his way into the palace. They certainly do little to disguise their jealousy that I have the princep's ear more readily than they." He snorts. "I'm sorry, what was the point of this inquest again?" [vasko.fucked |You put a hand on his shoulder. "I just wanted to get to know you a little better..." He bristles a moment, then sighs. "I'm sorry. You understand, I don't like to speak about myself here. The nobles look down on me just because I wasn't born in the city walls. Those bastards look down on anyone whose somethings-great grandfather wasn't taking it up the ass from Prince Philandros during the Godswar! This city is so mired in hidebound traditionalism that it can't recognize talent — and it hates it when talent surfaces anyway." |You put your hands up. "Just trying to talk." "Yes, well, let's keep our talk to matters of import. My business is none of yours, Champion." ] '

rows.translation: 关于他自己

rows.original: [vasko.fucked |Vasko rubs the bridge of his nose. "Why are you asking?" You give him a disarming smile. "Just curious. You said people were upset that you were the court's mage. I want to understand why." |"What, because I'm not highborn?" he says, giving you a dark look. "No," you say, "because you said everyone was against you here. If that's the case, how did you end up here anyway?" ] The salamander's shoulder relax, just a little. "Like I said, a lot of hard work. I suppose I should count myself lucky that I was born into Nareva's own domain, where even farm children are expected to be able to read. You can't say that about the poor in Old Belhar.[pc.bg slumrat |" "Yeah, tell me about it..." you murmur. You're one of the lucky few. Vasko gives you a surprisingly sympathetic look. " | ]I took to reading young and never stopped. Eventually my parents got tired of my howling for books and sent me to the temple. Kicked me out, really, at all of ten years old. They wanted me to become an acolyte; instead, I found the first man that looked wizardly and grabbed onto his tail like a lost babe. Yapped that I would be the best apprentice in the world if he'd take me in, that I'd do anything for him if he'd just show me how to cast a single spell." A faint smile plays across the magister's lips. "I had no idea he was the magister. I could have been whipped for grabbing such an august member of the court. Probably should have been." Vasko shakes his head. "But instead, he just scooped me up and asked what in the world I was doing in the plaza all by myself. It wasn't until years later I learned that he went around to my parents' farm that night and gave them a real piece of his mind, after I told him my story. All I knew was that he brought me to his home, fed me, and let me run loose in his library. I'd never been happier in my life... and seeing me devour those books cemented in my master's mind that I was worthy of his attention." "Even still..." Vasko says, looking to his shelves, "even after years spent in his tutelage, learning everything I could from him... years of grueling nights burning the wick down reading every damned book in his estate thrice over until I could recite them from memory, in the end my success came down to a quirk of fate as much as my own work." "Oh?" Vasko's lips twist. "My master and his husband had no children. No heir to pass on the title of magister to. Only by that good fortune was I even considered for the position... and Prince Evander made sure I worked my ass off to prove I was worthy of it. As did my master. Court Magister is a title coveted by every noble that can conjure and cantrip, and as my master ailed, I was made to compete against them all." "Clearly you won." "Clearly!" Vasko snarls. "Though not without enduring every manner of treachery — character assassination, sabotage, nothing was above those bastard brats short of outright killing me. And I am sure they would have tried, were we not all under the careful watch of the Order Astrida. [pc.isCunning|]Only the Court Magister has the right to operate without their oversight in this city[pc.isCunning|]; the rest of us were watched like hawks. Even still, their family and vassals would conspire... and I overcame them all!" You can feel the pride radiating from the salamander. For a frostscale, he's positively burning with it. "And now," he says, "I have comfortably put them all in their place. Those who challenged me find themselves cast to the edges of the realm, far from the city, and all their families can do is make their snide remarks. They have no real power. Not as I do."
rows.translation: [vasko.fucked |瓦斯科揉了揉鼻梁，问道：“你为什么这么问？” 你向他露出了一个让人放松的微笑，说道：“只是好奇而已。你之前说过，因为你是法庭的法师，所以有些人对此感到不满。我想了解一下原因。 |什么，就因为我不是贵族出身吗？”他说道，同时向你投来阴沉的目光。 “不，”你回答道，“是因为…… 你 大家都反对你，对吧？如果真是这样，那你究竟是怎么来到这里的呢？ ] 蝾螈的肩膀稍微放松了一些。“就像我说的，一个…… 很多 这是努力的结果。我想，能够出生在纳雷瓦的领地，确实应该算是我的幸运——在这里，就连农家的孩子也被期望能够识字。但在老贝尔哈尔，穷人们可就没有这样的机会了。[pc.bg slumrat |是啊，跟我说说吧……”你低声说道。你是那少数幸运的人之一。 瓦斯科用一种出人意料的同情目光看着你。 | ]我开始沉迷于阅读，而且从未停止过。最终，我的父母受够了我不停地索要书籍，于是把我送到了寺庙。实际上，他们是在我十岁的时候把我赶了出去。他们希望我成为一名寺院弟子，然而我却找到了第一个看起来像巫师的人，就像一个迷路的小婴儿一样紧紧抓住他的尾巴不放。 我当时拼命恳求他，告诉他如果他收我为徒，我一定会成为世界上最优秀的学徒；只要他教我如何施展一个法术，我愿意为他做任何事。” 法师的嘴角浮现出一丝淡淡的微笑：“我当时根本不知道他其实就是那位法师。 我抓了一个如此高贵的宫廷成员，简直应该被罚一顿鞭子……或许真的应该如此。”瓦斯科摇着头说道，“但相反，他竟然把我抱起来，问我究竟为什么会一个人出现在广场上。 直到多年后，我才得知，在我向他讲述了自己的遭遇之后，那个晚上他专门去了我父母的农场，把他们狠狠地训了一顿。当时我只知道，他把我带到了自己家里，给我吃了东西，还让我在他的图书馆里自由活动。 我这辈子从未如此开心过……看到我现在的样子，你们应该也能感受到吧。 吞噬 那些书籍让我深信，自己确实值得他的关注。” “然而……”瓦斯科望着自己的书架说道，“即使在他指导下度过了许多年，从他那里学到了所有能学到的知识……即使花费了无数个夜晚，反复阅读他收藏的每一本书，直到能够将它们全部熟记于心……但最终，我的成功在很大程度上还是取决于命运的安排，而不仅仅是我的努力。哦？” 瓦斯科的嘴角微微扭曲：“我的主人和他的丈夫没有孩子，也没有继承人可以继承‘大师’的头衔。正是由于这个原因，我才有机会获得这个职位……而埃万德王子也确保我必须全力以赴，证明自己确实配得上这个位置。 我的师父也是这样。对于每一个会施法、会使用戏法的高贵贵族来说，“宫廷法师”这个头衔都是他们梦寐以求的。而当我的师父身体不适时，我就被迫与他们所有人竞争。 “显然你赢了。” “当然！”瓦斯科怒吼道。 尽管我不得不忍受各种各样的背叛行为——包括人格诋毁、蓄意破坏，甚至那些混蛋们不惜采取任何手段来置我于死地。我敢肯定，如果不是因为阿斯特里达组织一直在密切监视着我们，他们肯定会尝试真的把我除掉。 [pc.isCunning|]只有宫廷法师才有权在这座城市中独立行事，无需他人的监督。[pc.isCunning|]而我们其他人，则像猎鹰一样被他们监视着。即便如此，他们的家人和附庸们还是会密谋……但我成功地击败了他们所有人！” 你能感受到这种自豪感从这只火蜥蜴身上散发出来。对于一只霜鳞生物来说，这种自豪感简直令他浑身散发着光芒。“现在，”它说道，“我已经把他们全都摆到了该在的位置上。那些敢于挑战我的人，都被赶到了王国的边缘，远离了城市；他们的家人所能做的，也只是说些刻薄的话而已。他们根本没有真正的权力——不像我。

If that's the case, how did you end up here anyway?" ] The salamander's shoulder relax, just a little. "Like I said, a lot of hard work. Even still, their family and vassals would conspire... and I overcame them all!" You can feel the pride radiating from the salamander. For a frostscale, he's positively burning with it. Those who challenged me find themselves cast to the edges of the realm, far from the city, and all their families can do is make their snide remarks. They have no real power. Not as I do." '

rows.translation: 成为大师

rows.original: Vasko sighs and plops himself down in a chair behind his workbench. "It's a curse, and an illusive one. Self-replicating, if the Order Astrida are to be believed — which, I should stress, is not something I recommend. Make up your own mind, the goddess of secrets' servants shouldn't be taken at face value any more than Keros's." [party.has kiyoko |Kiyoko huffs. ] [pc.ra kitsune |You furrow your brow at him. ]"And what do you think, then?" "I think it's biological in nature. An affliction of her womanhood... Tethys won't listen to me when I try and explain it, damn her pride, but the girl's in heat. She's randy as a cat, and for the same reason. She could solve this problem tonight if she'd let her daughter spread her legs properly." "You really think it would be that easy?" Vasko nods. "I'd stake my career on it. And I would have to — have offered to — to prove the point. But Tethys and Evander are obsessed with their daughter's asinine marriage pact, as if that will somehow save the principality all on its own, and refuse to confront reality: their daughter's body is craving a child, and it won't stop until that heat's been quenched by a man's seed." [pc.bg noblescion courtesan minstrel |You know that's a much harder ask for nobles than perhaps even Vasko is aware, or at least willing to acknowledge. Breaking marriage pacts is a good way to kick off a war, or invite an assassin's blade. |That's a hell of a bold claim... ] "So what's your solution, exactly?" Vasko glances past you, making sure nobody else is eavesdropping from the doorway. Even still, his voice drops to a whisper. "I know what spell Kythie's betrothed will use to check that she is a maiden, and I am developing a countermeasure. Something to fool their priest. She's got another year before her fiance is of age to come up here, plenty of time to grunt out a quick bastard and spirit it away to a monastery somewhere. This need not even damage the princess's reputation, if she remains sequestered during the months she shows..." "That's not much of a solution. What if the curse comes back after she's had her child?" Vasko shrugs. "By then she'll be on the cusp of marriage. Her husband can tend her needs. As Tethys herself keeps saying, I'm sure an energetic young man won't mind a wife desperate to drain him until she's with child. Most men fantasize of just that." A grim fate for the poor girl... "That's a [pc.isDK |shitty |poor ] solution. We have to be able to do better." Vasko scoffs. "Good luck, Champion. I'll be here when you see sense."
rows.translation: 瓦斯科叹了口气，然后坐在工作台后面的椅子上。“这简直是一种诅咒，而且是一种虚幻的诅咒。如果相信阿斯特里达教团的说法的话，这种东西还能自我复制——不过我必须强调，我并不推荐相信他们的说法。你们自己好好想想吧，那些服务于秘密女神的人，根本不能被轻信，就像那些服务于凯罗斯的人一样。 [party.has kiyoko |清子气呼呼地说。 ] [pc.ra kitsune |你皱着眉头看着他。 ]那么，接下来会怎么样呢？ 你 那么，你认为是怎么回事呢？” “我认为这属于生理层面的问题。是她女性特质的某种表现……每当我试图向她解释时，她根本不会听我的，该死的，就是她的自尊心作祟…… 这姑娘正处于发情期。她跟猫一样欲火中烧，原因也是一样的。如果让她的女儿好好张开双腿，她今晚就能解决这个问题。” “你真觉得会这么简单吗？” 瓦斯科点了点头：“我愿意用我的职业生涯来打赌。 我本应该主动提出来证明这一点。但是泰西斯和埃文德对女儿那愚蠢的婚约太过执着，仿佛这个婚约就能独自拯救整个公国似的，他们拒绝面对现实：他们女儿的身体迫切需要一个孩子，而这种渴望只有通过男人的种子才能得到满足。" [pc.bg noblescion courtesan minstrel |你知道，对于贵族们来说，这个要求其实比瓦斯科所意识到的，或者至少比他愿意承认的，要困难得多。违反婚姻契约，往往是引发战争的导火线，也会招致刺客的杀机。 |这可真是个大胆的说法啊…… ] 那么，你究竟有什么解决办法呢？” 瓦斯科瞥了你一眼，确保没有其他人从门口偷听。即便如此，他的声音还是降到了耳语的程度。“我知道凯西的未婚夫会使用什么咒语来验证她的贞操，我正在研究相应的对策。 这只是为了哄骗他们的牧师罢了。她的未婚夫还要再过一年才能达到成年年龄，所以她有足够的时间生下孩子，然后把孩子送到某个修道院去。这样一来，甚至不会损害公主的名誉——只要她在那几个月里一直被关起来不外出就行了。这算什么解决办法啊？要是她生完孩子后，诅咒又重新出现了怎么办？” 瓦斯科耸了耸肩：“到那时她应该快要结婚了。她的丈夫可以照顾她的需求。就像泰西斯自己说的，我相信一个精力充沛的年轻男子，肯定不会介意自己的妻子在怀孕之前一直消耗他的精力吧。 大多数男人都幻想过这样的情景。 这个可怜的女孩注定要遭遇悲惨的命运……“真是太…… [pc.isDK |糟糕透了 |可怜的 ] 我们必须能够做得更好。” 瓦斯科嗤笑道：“祝你好运，冠军。等你终于明白道理的时候，我还在这里等着你。

Make up your own mind, the goddess of secrets' servants shouldn't be taken at face value any more than Keros's." "I know what spell Kythie's betrothed will use to check that she is a maiden, and I am developing a countermeasure. Something to fool their priest. She's got another year before her fiance is of age to come up here, plenty of time to grunt out a quick bastard and spirit it away to a monastery somewhere. This need not even damage the princess's reputation, if she remains sequestered during the months she shows..." "That's not much of a solution. What if the curse comes back after she's had her child?" Vasko shrugs. "By then she'll be on the cusp of marriage. Her husband can tend her needs. As Tethys herself keeps saying, I'm sure an energetic young man won't mind a wife desperate to drain him until she's with child. Most men fantasize of just that." A grim fate for the poor girl... "That's a [pc.isDK |shitty |poor ] solution. We have to be able to do better." Vasko scoffs. "Good luck, Champion. I'll be here when you see sense." "

rows.translation: 关于凯西的诅咒

rows.original: [kythie.isCursed |Vasko gives you a dark look. "You suspect the princess's curse is politically motivated, eh? Smart. I do as well. There's no shortage of other noble houses nipping at Evander's heels, ready for the moment the Tychrisian lineage finally dies out. It wouldn't surprise me if an offshoot house was ready to accelerate things while the royal family is small and vulnerable." "What's behind the hostility?" you ask. "Or are they just opportunistic?" "Hah, what's the difference? The nobility are all just sharks wearing salamander faces, entitled to all they can eat by din of strength. The moment they smell blood in the water..." He points upwards, towards the tower, "they'll be ready to tear Evander and Kythie apart." Vasko sneers, shaking his head. "The rural barons have been getting richer and richer these last years, on the backs of their farm laborers' produce. We've had a generation of good harvests here, the best since the Godswar — the land's finally beginning to recover, the Velunites say. The lords that own the land are the direct beneficiaries of it, and they're getting restless. Hungry for more than just wealth. They've been campaigning Evander to expand the borders, seize more land. Maybe all the way to Maidenbridge, to Hawkethorne." The magister pauses, gauging your reaction. "Of course, Evander refuses. He's a man of peace. His lords think he's weak." "Who would stand to benefit the most, is something happened to Kythie?" "Her cousins, of course. Should Kythie die or be declared unfit to rule, they would become the de facto heirs. But I have my doubts. They're city-girls, and have shown a fierce loyalty to Kythie herself. No, I would put the finger towards the rural nobles, at a guess. Baron Ruarc en Rhydan is the strongest of the landed lords, with the largest estate. The other barons listen to him, and he's had success in war against the Lion Witch. If the royal line faltered, he'd be strongly positioned to depose them." "And do you think he'd stoop to something like this?" "Who can say? His peers think he's an honorable man," Vasko says, "but every highborn is trained from a young age to put forward a genial face while they hide a dagger behind their back." |Vasko sighs, leaning back against the wall. "Things have stabilized, now that Kythie is better. A few public appearances have reassured the people that their princess is in good health and spirits after so long sequestered. Evander's taken the opportunity to bring in some of his barons, remind them of his power." "You don't exactly sound thrilled." He answers that with a glower. "I'm glad Kythie is feeling better. Don't doubt that for a second, [pc.name]. But the situation in the city has hardly changed. Perhaps you've bought His Grace another generation, but eventually he'll grow old, and Kythie will have to contend with a new crop of seething sycophants cloying their way into power around her, ready to stab her in the back. Kythie may be [kythie.isDragon |stronger than ever, but even a dragon isn't without a chink in its armor |healthy again, but she's no stronger in her position today than she was before you arrived ]. The bloodline is weak, and the barons are patient. You'll see." ]
rows.translation: [kythie.isCursed |瓦斯科用阴沉的目光看着你：“你怀疑公主的诅咒背后有着政治目的，是吧？挺聪明的。我也有这个想法。其他贵族家族可不少，都在盯着埃万德不放，一旦提克里斯家族最终绝迹，他们就会立刻抢夺权力。如果某个分支家族趁王室成员人数稀少、处境脆弱的时候加快行动，我一点也不会感到惊讶。 这种敌意背后究竟隐藏着什么？”你问道，“还是说他们只是在伺机而动而已？” “哈，这有什么区别吗？那些贵族不就是一群戴着蝾螈面具的鲨鱼吗？他们凭借力量来攫取一切他们想要的东西。一旦他们闻到水中有血腥味……”他指向上方，指向那座塔，“他们就会立刻迫不及待地想要拆散埃文德和凯西。 瓦斯科冷笑着，摇了摇头：“这些年来，那些乡下的贵族们依靠农民们的劳动成果，变得越来越富有。我们这里这一代人的收成一直很好，是自‘神战’以来最好的——据维鲁尼特人说，这片土地终于开始恢复了。 拥有这些土地的领主们是这些利益的直接受益者，他们开始变得焦躁不安。他们的欲望不仅仅是财富——他们一直在游说埃文德扩大疆界，夺取更多的土地。也许他们的目标甚至是梅登布里奇，甚至是霍克索恩。那位长者停顿了一下，观察着你的反应。‘当然，埃文德拒绝了。他是个崇尚和平的人，他的领主们认为他很软弱。 谁会从中获得最大的利益？难道凯西出了什么事吗？” “当然是她的表亲们。如果凯西去世或者被认定不适合统治，他们就会成为事实上的继承人。但我对此表示怀疑。他们都是城市里的姑娘，而且一直对凯西本人表现出极大的忠诚。不，我猜，真正应该被怀疑的是那些乡下的贵族们。 鲁阿尔克·恩·瑞丹男爵是所有领主中最强大的一个。他拥有最大的领地，其他男爵们也都听他的指挥。在对抗狮女巫的战争中，他也取得了胜利。如果王室血脉出现动摇，他的地位将使他完全有能力废黜他们。 “那你认为他会做出这种事吗？” “谁又能说得准呢？他的同僚们都认为他是个正直的人，”瓦斯科说道，“但每个贵族从幼年时期就开始学习如何表面装出友善的样子，而在背后却隐藏着杀机。 |瓦斯科叹了口气，靠在墙上。“现在凯西的情况好转了，局势也稳定下来了。她参加了几次公开活动，让人们看到，经过这么长时间的隔离，他们的公主身体健康、精神状态也不错。埃文德也趁这个机会，把他的那些男爵们召集过来，向他们展示自己的实力。” “你听起来可不太高兴啊。” 他怒视着回答道：“我当然很高兴凯西的情况好转了。这一点你绝对不要怀疑。 [pc.name]但是这座城市的情况几乎没有任何改变。也许你为陛下购置了新一代的随从，但最终他们也会变老，而凯西将会面临另一批趋炎附势之徒——他们会趁机接近权力核心，随时准备在背后捅她一刀。凯西或许…… [kythie.isDragon |比以往任何时候都更强大，但即便是龙，也难免会有弱点。 |她已经恢复了健康，但如今她所处的处境，并没有因为你的到来而有所改变。 ]这个血脉太弱了，那些大贵族们自然会耐心等待的。你等着瞧吧。 ]

rows.translation: 提克里斯的现状

rows.original: The magister laughs. "[vasko.fucked |My dear [pc.name], we're in the City of Sorcery. |This is Tychris, Champion, the City of Sorcery. ] Mages are a hawk a hundred here. The principality has its own corps of sorcerers-at-arms, trained and equipped at the crown's expense. The city has a long tradition of masters and apprenticeship, dating back centuries, that's seen sorcery pass through the generations. Today there's probably three hundred independent magicians in the city, not counting those employed by the crown or the temple." "Some of them must rise about the others[vasko.fucked |, like you did ]." He smirks. "Well, of course. Lady Zainem is probably the most famous of them, a brilliant mind in a body in a body sculpted from ice and marble. She's certainly the city's most prolific author. You can catch her debating men she could probably snap in half in the town square most weekends. Even greater than her, if you only judge raw power, was Ynes of Corlund. She is a girl of humble origins, and yet became a magister of unrivaled power... until the Order Astrida found her, bound her, and stripped her ability to cast spells entirely. A cruel fate — though not undeserved. Not all with power use it well. Still, had she been bent to useful purpose instead, she could have been a glorious servant of the crown. Even if her magics are unorthodox, she's a repository of knowledge the likes of which haven't been since since Old Belhar burned." Unorthodox magic, is it...?
rows.translation: 大师笑了起来。[vasko.fucked |亲爱的 [pc.name]我们现在身处魔法之城。 |我是提克里斯，魔法之城的冠军。 ] 这里的法师数量多达数百人。这个公国拥有自己的一支由皇家出资培养和装备的法师军队。这座城市有着悠久的师徒传承传统，这一传统可以追溯到几个世纪以前，正是这种传统使得魔法得以代代相传。如今，这座城市里大概有三百名独立的法师，当然还不包括那些为皇家或神庙工作的法师。 其中，肯定有一些法师会比其他法师更出色、更成功。[vasko.fucked |就像你之前做的那样 ]他咧嘴一笑：“嗯，当然。扎伊奈姆女士可能是其中最著名的一位了——她拥有非凡的智慧，而她那如冰如玉般精致的外表更是令人赞叹。她无疑是这座城市最多产的作家。每个周末，你都能在镇广场上看到她与那些她或许能一拳打倒的人进行辩论。不过，如果仅仅以纯粹的力量来衡量的话，还有一个人比她更厉害…… 科伦德的伊内丝。她出身卑微，却成为了拥有无与伦比力量的法师。……直到阿斯特里达教团找到了她，将她束缚起来，彻底剥夺了她施法的能力。这是一个残酷的命运——不过这也并非她应得的惩罚。并非所有拥有力量的人都能善加利用它。不过，如果她的能力能够被用于有益的目的，她本可以成为王室的杰出仆从。即便她的魔法方式并不传统，但她所掌握的知识，也是自古老贝拉尔被毁以来再未出现的珍宝。 非传统的魔法啊……真是如此吗……？

The principality has its own corps of sorcerers-at-arms, trained and equipped at the crown's expense. The city has a long tradition of masters and apprenticeship, dating back centuries, that's seen sorcery pass through the generations. Today there's probably three hundred independent magicians in the city, not counting those employed by the crown or the temple." "Some of them must rise about the others[vasko.fucked |, like you did ]." He smirks. "Well, of course. You can catch her debating men she could probably snap in half in the town square most weekends. Even greater than her, if you only judge raw power, was Ynes of Corlund. She is a girl of humble origins, and yet became a magister of unrivaled power... until the Order Astrida found her, bound her, and stripped her ability to cast spells entirely. A cruel fate — though not undeserved. Not all with power use it well. Still, had she been bent to useful purpose instead, she could have been a glorious servant of the crown. Even if her magics are unorthodox, she's a repository of knowledge the likes of which haven't been since since Old Belhar burned." Unorthodox magic, is it...? "

rows.translation: 镇上的其他法师们

rows.original: "Yes, considering the dangerous chemicals we work with, the magister has special dispensation to modify the windows in here," Vasko says, pointing towards the open glass beside his fireplace. "It's been that way for a hundred years, all I had to do with it is replacing the hinge every now and then. Now what's this about some night?" "A few months before the Tycathalon, Princess Kythie and Prince Lazaran had a chance encounter beneath the tree there," you say, walking to the window and pointing straight down. "You seem like the kind of man who'd be up at odd hours, maybe you overheard something?" Vasko sucks on her lower lip, making a visible effort to think back. "Mmm, I wouldn't know if it was Prinze Lazaran or not. I hardly know the boy. But I do vaguely recall a few months ago now, there was a commotion out there in the middle of the night. Kythie was screaming at somebody down there. I have no idea about what, but she was certainly furious." "Did you see anything?" "No, no. I'm not about to involve myself in teenage drama. If she'd sounded like she was in trouble, of course I would have, but it just seemed like an argument to me." Right...
rows.translation: 是的，考虑到我们工作中会接触到一些危险的化学物质，所以负责人获得了特别许可，可以在这里改装窗户，”瓦斯科一边说，一边指向壁炉旁那扇敞开的玻璃窗。“这样的设计已经持续了一百年，我只需要偶尔更换一下铰链而已。 那么，这个故事是关于什么事情的呢？” “在提卡塔隆节之前的几个月，凯西公主和拉扎兰王子在那棵树下偶然相遇了，”你边说边走向窗户，直直地指向下方。 你看起来是那种会在半夜出门的人，也许你听到了什么吧？” 瓦斯科轻轻咬着她的下唇，显然在努力回忆。“嗯，我不确定那是不是拉扎兰王子说的。 我几乎不认识那个男孩。不过我隐约记得，几个月前，半夜的时候外面发生了一场骚动。Kythie当时在尖叫…… 有人 在下面。我完全不知道发生了什么，但她肯定气坏了。” “你看到什么了吗？” “没有，没有。我可不想卷入青少年之间的纷争里。如果她听起来像是遇到了麻烦，我当然会…… 会 本来是有的，但在我看来，那只不过是一场争论而已。” 对吧……

Kythie was screaming at somebody down there. I have no idea about what, but she was certainly furious." "Did you see anything?" "No, no. I'm not about to involve myself in teenage drama. If she'd sounded like she was in trouble, of course I would have, but it just seemed like an argument to me." Right... '

rows.translation: 窗口视图

rows.original:
Vasko cuts his eyes to you with a sly smile, closing the book he's been flipping through. [vasko.isDad
        |"Well, you're the [pc.mf
            |— mm... other father? Yes, that, I suppose —
            |mother
        ] of my child[vasko.numKids 2
            |ren
        ]. That is, itself, a relationship, is it not?" 
    ]He sighs and raps his claws on the tome's cover. "I am not a romantic, [pc.name]. Don't expect grand gestures or moonlit dates... but I have enjoyed our time together. I would happily continue to enjoy it in the future, so long as you remain a fixture here in the court." 
    
    [vasko.isEvil
        |He drops his voice to barely a whisper. "And when I become princeps, it would be my greatest pleasure to take you as my royal concubine. You've more than earned the post, not least because of your... discretion."
        
        His tail wraps around your waist, pulling you close. "The future is ours to seize, [pc.name]. There is no one in this realm I would rather share it with."
        |You chuckle. "Is that really all?"
        
        Vasko furrows his brow, and allows his tail to slither around to caress your [pc.leg]. "I don't know what you want me to say. If you are fishing for an awkward confession of love, I'm afraid I'll have to refer you back to my opening statement — that sort of thing is beyond me. I'm not much for tender gestures, but I am sincere when I say: our time together has been memorable, and I will cherish it."
    ]
    
    You give the salamander a smile and put your arm around him. You can live with that.
rows.translation:
瓦斯科用狡黠的笑容看着你，然后合上了他一直在翻阅的那本书。 [vasko.isDad
        |嗯，你才是那个…… [pc.mf
            |— 嗯……另一个父亲？是的，我想就是那个吧……
            |母亲
        ] 我的孩子[vasko.numKids 2
            |ren
        ]也就是说，这种关系本身也是一种联系，不是吗？ 
    ]他叹了口气，用爪子敲了敲那本古籍的封面：“我可不是什么多愁善感的人…… [pc.name]别指望有什么隆重的举动或月色下的约会……但我很享受我们在一起的时光。只要你依然留在这个宫廷里，我也很乐意继续享受这样的时光。 
    
    [vasko.isEvil
        |他压低声音，几乎变成了耳语：“等到我成为王位继承人，能让你成为我的王室妃子将是我最大的荣幸。你完全配得上这个地位，尤其是因为你……表现得如此谨慎。”

他的尾巴绕在你的腰间，将你拉得更近：“未来属于我们，让我们一起抓住它吧。 [pc.name]在这个世界上，没有谁比我更愿意与之共享这一切。
        |你轻笑起来：“真的就只有这些吗？”

瓦斯科皱起了眉头，让它的尾巴绕过来轻轻抚摸你…… [pc.leg]我不知道你希望我说什么。如果你是在期待我做出一个尴尬的表白，那我恐怕只能重复我一开始说的话——那种事情我确实做不到。我不太擅长表达温柔的情感，但我真心觉得：我们在一起的时光非常难忘，我会永远珍惜它。
    ]
    
    你对着蝾螈笑了笑，然后搂住了它。这样的生活，你也能够接受。

rows.translation: 关系？

rows.original: [flags.VASKO_SEX |Is [vasko.heShe] interested in some more fun? [vasko.isBimbo |The bimbo'd mander giggles, looking you up and down appreciatively. "With you? Always." She twines her fingers with yours and tugs you along towards her bed. |"With you, my dear [pc.name], always." The court magister places a hand on the small of your back, guiding you with a soft yet firm touch towards his open bedroom door. 		|Ynes is sitting at her desk in the back, well away from the temple's actual acolytes.
		|There's an attractive young woman in the black-and-argent robes of the temple sitting behind a desk all the way at the back of the library, well away from the temple's regular supplicants. Scruffy red hair spills down around her shoulders, framing the pale, freckled features of a woman from the continent's far south. She doesn't seem busy at the moment...
	]"

rows.translation: [ynes.met|伊内斯|红发侍从]
[ynes.met|英尼斯|红发侍从]

rows.original:
The flame-haired acolyte is watching you long before you arrive at her desk, first out of curiosity, then what looks like apprehension as it becomes clear that, no, you aren't just walking in her general direction with the intent to look at a nearby stack of books — you mean to actually talk to her. With great trepidation she sits up in her chair, straightening her back and adjusting the small Narevan clasp on her bulky, loose robes. "Good [dayNight
        |day
        |evening
    ]," she finally says once you're within whispering range. Her voice is timid, tinged with a[tui.recruited
        | familiar accent — similar to Atugia's.
        |n accent you can't quite place. Something deeply southern, maybe.
    ] "Can I help you find something?"
    
    [party.has atugia
        |The [silly
            |gnome
            |warrior
        ] herself picks up on it too, and grins at her countryman.
    ]
    
    "[pc.dcb
        |Hey,"
        |Hello,"
        |Hiiii!"
    ] you say back. "I'm [pc.name]. Are you an acolyte here?"
    
    "Oh, no. Not as such," the woman says, glancing away. "My name is Ynes, of Corlund. I am trusted to keep watch over the library's restricted section."
    
    As she speaks, she looks up to the towering stacks surrounding her on either side with just a hint of pride in her voice... and in so doing, you note two things in rapid succession: first, that there is a fur-padded leather collar resting snugly around the woman's neck, threaded with azure that glows ever so faintly in the torchlight. The second: beneath that, the skin of her neck has been thoroughly tattooed, covered in a lilac-hued ink weaving into arcane runes. Ynes quickly adjusts her robes once she notices your gaze, shrinking into her chair. "You would be the Champion of [var0|Frost|Hawkethorne], would you not? Such a title gives you access to our collection, if you're interested in something..."
    
    "What's in this section?"
    
    "Spellbooks, bequeathed to the temple by hundreds of mages over the years in the absence of heirs. Tomes of martial knowledge penned as devotionals to the goddess. The collected findings of the Azure Brotherhood. Magisterial robes, rods, and staves donated by the city's craftsmen as acts of faith. Any book or object that might lead towards the harm of others is kept under key, under my watch — and requires a sizable donation to peruse."
    
    Of course it does.
rows.translation:
那个红发女侍从在你走到她的办公桌前很久就已经注意到了你。起初她只是出于好奇，但后来当她发现你并非只是随意朝她的方向走过去，而是真的打算和她交谈时，她的表情中明显流露出担忧。她小心翼翼地坐直身子，整理了一下自己那件宽松厚重的长袍上那个小小的纳雷文装饰扣件，然后说道：“你好。 [dayNight
        |天
        |晚上
    ]终于，在你靠近到可以低声说话的距离时，她开口说道。她的声音很轻柔，带着一丝……[tui.recruited
        | 熟悉的口音——与阿图吉亚的口音很相似。
        |一种你一时无法确定具体来自哪个地区的口音。或许，那是某种极具南方特色的口音吧。
    ] 需要我帮您找些什么吗？
    
    [party.has atugia
        |那个 [silly
            |地精
            |战士
        ] 她自己也注意到了这一点，然后对着自己的同胞笑了笑。
    ]
    
    "[pc.dcb
        |嘿，
        |你好，
        |嗨呀！
    ] 你回答道：“我是…… [pc.name]你是这里的助手吗？”

“哦，不，并不是这样的，”那位女士说道，同时将目光移开了。“我叫伊内丝，来自科伦德。我被委托负责看管图书馆的那些限制访问的区域。”

她说话的时候，抬头望向周围高耸的书架，声音中带着一丝自豪。就这样，你迅速注意到了两件事情：首先，那名女子的脖子上戴着一个毛皮衬里的皮革项圈，上面镶嵌着淡蓝色的宝石，在火把的光芒下微微闪烁；其次，在项圈的下方，她的颈部皮肤上被纹满了复杂的图案，那些淡紫色的墨迹交织成神秘的符文。 当伊内斯注意到你的目光时，她迅速调整了自己的长袍，然后缩坐在椅子上。“你应该就是那位冠军吧…… [var0|霜冻|霍克索恩]你不觉得这样很好吗？这样的头衔会让你能够访问我们的收藏库，如果你对某些东西感兴趣的话……”

“这个分类里有什么？”

“法术书啊。这些法术书是多年来许多没有继承人的法师们捐赠给这座寺庙的。 这些关于武学知识的典籍都是作为对女神的虔诚献礼而撰写的。其中汇集了“蔚蓝兄弟会”多年的研究成果。那些法师长袍、法杖以及权杖，都是城中工匠们出于信仰而捐赠的。任何可能被用来伤害他人的书籍或物品，都会被锁起来，由我亲自看管——而且要想查阅这些资料，也需要缴纳一笔不菲的费用。当然会了。

rows.original:
[ynes.fucked
        |[ynes.pregStage 0 1 2 3
            |Ynes gives you a shy, pretty smile as you approach. "Hello, my Champion. What brings you over to me today?"
            |Ynes gives you a shy, pretty smile as you approach. "Hello, my Champion. What brings you over to me today?"
            |Ynes is sitting a little further back from her desk today, hands resting over her [ynes.belly]. She gives you a warm smile as you approach. "My Champion! I'm glad to see you."
            |Ynes can barely fit behind her desk now, with her great big belly pushing through the front of her robes. She's cradling it in her arms even sitting down. Her features are practically glowing as you approach. "Hello, my Champion! We're both so glad to see you."
        ]
        |Ynes inclines her head as you approach, and smooths out her bulky robes. "Greetings again, Champion. How may I help you today?"
    ]

rows.translation: 说话吧。
先随便聊聊天吧。
调情

rows.original: Perhaps you and Ynes could catch some private time...?
rows.translation: 也许你和Ynes可以找些独处的时间……？
rows.raw: "Perhaps you and Ynes could catch some private time...?"

rows.original: You'd like to take a closer look at these magic tattoos — and actually learn some of the magic she inked into her body.
rows.translation: 你一定想要仔细看看这些魔法纹身，从而真正了解她将自己的魔法力量注入身体的方式。
rows.raw: "You'd like to take a closer look at these magic tattoos — and actually learn some of the magic she inked into her body."

rows.original: You can't learn new spells from her tattoos.
rows.translation: 你无法从她的纹身中学习新的法术。
