rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original:
"Pardon me, [pc.ra astrida
        |[pc.mf
            |Brother
            |Sister
        ]
        |Champion
    ]," one of the Astrida standing watch at the doors says, catching your shoulder when you walk past. "You've had some good news while you're out and about."
    
    "Oh?"
    
    The black-scaled salamander gives you a smirk. "Come with me." 
    
    Well, alright. You fall in behind her, entering the temple and then right back out of the sanctuary again through one of the side doors. You're lead down a short flight of stairs and a winding set of stone-walled halls, warmed by thick rigs and tapestries. Rather than priests and paladins down here, you see a number of other temple thralls, all with the same runic collars you're familiar with from Ynes.
    
    "Are they all Dreamless?"
    
    "Mm." The Astrida nods, approaching a door and giving it one sharp knock. "This is where they live. Speaking of which..."
    
    You hear Eirina from inside. "Come in."
    
    Your guide opens the door, and then steps aside. "[pc.ra astrida
        |[pc.mf
            |Brother
            |Sister
        ]
        |Champion
    ]." 
    
    You take the hint and go in, to find a small bedchamber almost overflowing with books on wooden shelves, a desk, and piled into the corners. Eirina's kneeling at the bedside, using her lifted tail to illuminate Ynes, lying atop it, with a babe on her breast. 
    
    Your babe. [silly
        |The babe with the power. What power? The power of voodoo.
    ]
    
    Your breath catches in your throat, and you take a faltering step inside, sending a stack of books slumping over. "Ynes!"
    
    "Ah, there you are. Tardy, as expected!" Ynes laughs, looking up at you with a weary, but genuine, smile. Eirina gives you a thumbs up over her shoulder and scoots over to make room for you to join them, closer to the lucky lady and your newborn. Ynes's huge, inked bosom is almost big enough to hide the little bundle in her arms, topped by a few wispy curls of flame-red hair. "Come, meet your son."
rows.translation:
对不起， [pc.ra astrida
        |[pc.mf
            |兄弟
            |姐姐
        ]
        |冠军
    ]你出去的时候肯定听到了一些好消息吧，”站在门口站岗的阿斯特里达之一在你经过时抓住你的肩膀说道。

“哦？”

那只黑鳞蝾螈冲你露出了一个狡黠的笑容。 跟我来。”

好吧，那就跟着她进去吧。你们先进入寺庙，然后从侧门再次离开那个神圣的地方。接下来，你们会沿着一段短短的楼梯往下走，接着穿过一系列由石墙围成的蜿蜒走廊，这些走廊里挂满了厚厚的毯子和挂毯，为这里带来了温暖。 在这里，你看到的不是牧师或圣骑士，而是许多其他的寺庙奴仆，他们全都戴着你们在伊内斯见过的那种符文项圈。

“他们都是‘无梦者’吗？”

“嗯。”阿斯特里达点了点头，然后走向一扇门，猛地敲了敲门。 他们就住在这里。说起来……”

你听到艾琳娜从里面叫道：“进来吧。”

你的向导打开了门，然后退到了一边。[pc.ra astrida
        |[pc.mf
            |兄弟
            |姐姐
        ]
        |冠军
    ]你明白了这个暗示，便走了进去。那里有一间小卧室，木制书架上堆满了书籍，书桌也摆在那里，还有一些书被堆放在角落里。艾琳娜正跪在床边，她抬起尾巴，为躺在床上的伊内斯照亮道路，而伊内斯的怀里正抱着一个婴儿。

你的婴儿。 [silly
        |那个拥有魔力的婴儿……什么魔力？那就是伏都教的魔力。
    ]
    
    你的呼吸顿时变得急促起来，你踉跄着迈步走进去，结果一叠书因此倒了下来。“伊内斯！”

“啊，你来了。果然迟到了！”伊内斯笑着，抬头看着你，脸上带着疲惫但真诚的笑容。 艾琳娜从肩膀后面朝你竖起了大拇指，然后挪了挪位置，让你能够加入他们，靠近那位幸运的女士以及你的新生儿。伊内斯那丰满的、涂了墨汁般的胸部几乎大到足以遮住她怀中的小婴儿，她的头顶还散布着一缕缕火焰红色的头发。 过来，见见你的儿子吧。

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original:
"My son..." you echo, kneeling down and placing a hand on the baby boy. The little bundle looks up at you for the first time, big hazel eyes wide with amazement at the world. You smile at him, caressing his big, pale head, and he gives up his mouthful of teat to smile at you. 
    
    Eirina puts a hand on her chest. "Ow, my heart. Say, have you thought up a name for him?"
    
    "I suppose we haven't had a conversation about it yet." Ynes glances at you. "I was contemplating Lewyn, the last king of my home country. A strong, wise man. But I could be persuaded, if you have a better idea...?"
rows.translation:
我的儿子……”你轻声说道，跪了下来，将手放在那个男婴的头上。小婴儿第一次抬头看着你，那双大大的淡褐色眼睛里充满了对这个世界的惊奇与好奇。你对他笑了笑，轻轻抚摸着他那颗圆润、略带苍白的脑袋，而他也不再含着奶嘴，露出了笑容来回应你。 
    
    艾琳娜把手放在胸口上，说道：“哎哟，我的心啊……你说，你们有没有为它想好名字呢？”

“我想我们还没有讨论过这个话题吧。”伊内斯看了你一眼，继续说道：“我一直在考虑用‘卢温’这个名字，那可是我故乡的最后一位国王啊。 一个坚强而睿智的人。不过，如果你能提出一个更好的方案，我应该会被说服的……？
rows.raw:
'
    "My son..." you echo, kneeling down and placing a hand on the baby boy. The little bundle looks up at you for the first time, big hazel eyes wide with amazement at the world. You smile at him, caressing his big, pale head, and he gives up his mouthful of teat to smile at you. 
    
    Eirina puts a hand on her chest. "Ow, my heart. Say, have you thought up a name for him?"
    
    "I suppose we haven't had a conversation about it yet." Ynes glances at you. "I was contemplating Lewyn, the last king of my home country. A strong, wise man. But I could be persuaded, if you have a better idea...?"


    '

rows.original: [var0 |"Lewyn is good," you say with a nod. Ynes allows herself a rare warm smile, stroking her son's little tuft of hair. "Lewyn. My big, strong boy. What a man you shall make." "Hopefully a little less of a womanizer than King Lewyn," Eirina laughs. Ynes sticks her tongue out at the Astrida, which just sets Lewyn to giggling. The baby waves his little arms until he ends up grasping your finger. You feel your [pc.isDK |black old ]heart swell, and you lean in to shower little [ynes.kidName] with kisses. |Eirina flicks the baby's hair. "Hmm, [ynes.kidName], huh? I like that." "Oh, well, if Eirina likes it maybe we should reconsider." The Astrida sticks her tongue out, which makes [ynes.kidName] giggle. The baby waves his little arms until he ends up grasping your finger. You feel your [pc.isDK |black old ]heart swell, and you lean in to shower little [ynes.kidName] with kisses. ] "Alright, alright, don't spoil him," Ynes laugh. The moment you unhand the boy, though, she's putting him right back on the breast. Who's spoiling who...? You shake your head and turn to Eirina. "Hey, about [ynes.kidName] and his future. Ynes said it's traditional to-" Eirina gives you a little punch on the shoulder. "Already done. I sent the paperwork to Prince Evander the day Ynes told me she was with child. As long as you two don't plan on turning little [ynes.kidName] here into a rune-wizard like his mom, you don't need to worry about me. I'm just here because I care about [eirina.fucked |you both |Ynes ], not to inspect my new merchandise." Ynes thanks her with a thump on top of the head. "Don't call my son merchandise." "I was saying he— agh, nevermind. I'm gonna leave you two — you three — to it." Eirina pushes herself up to her feet, pets [ynes.kidName] on the head, and makes for the door. "Take care of them, [pc.name]." You wave as the Astrida commander shows herself out, before turning your attention back to your son. Your free son, unbound to the temple. "What do you want to do with him? Keep him here?" Ynes nods firmly. "Yes, absolutely. Gods know, I have a comfortable enough life here. I'm not worried about saving the world, or demons, and all that you've got to occupy you. My worst fear most days is a misplaced grimoire. I can handle a baby boy on top of my duties, and... and I think it would do me some good, having something beyond work. I'm sure the library won't mind. He's very well-behaved." "Well, he takes after me." "Yes, pet," Ynes laughs, "he's obsessed with my boobs, too. Runs in the family, I suspect." Ynes crooks a finger, bringing you down into range for her to kiss you. The two of you spend a little while longer together, just enjoying each other's company — and the company of your newborn son — before eventually both partner and child start to yawn. You take the hint, give them both a kiss, and head back upstairs to let them rest.
rows.translation: [var0 |莱温真是个好孩子，”你点头说道。 伊内斯难得地露出了温暖的笑容，轻抚着儿子那小撮头发：“莱温，我坚强勇敢的儿子啊，你将来一定会成为一个了不起的人。” “希望他不会像莱温国王那样是个花花公子吧，”艾琳娜笑着说。 伊内斯对着阿斯特里达吐了吐舌头，这让莱温忍不住咯咯笑了起来。小家伙挥动着小手臂，最后终于抓住了你的手指。你感受到他的…… [pc.isDK |非常古老 ]心中充满感动，你凑上前去，轻轻拥抱那个小小的生命。 [ynes.kidName] 带着吻。 |艾琳娜轻抚着婴儿的头发，说道：“嗯…… [ynes.kidName]哈？我喜欢这样。” “哦，好吧，如果…… 艾琳娜 如果她喜欢的话，也许我们应该重新考虑一下。” 阿斯特里达吐了吐舌头，这一动作让…… [ynes.kidName] 咯咯笑起来。婴儿挥动着自己的小手臂，最终抓住了你的手指。你感觉到…… [pc.isDK |非常古老 ]心中充满感动，你凑近去轻柔地抚摸它。 [ynes.kidName] 带着吻。 ] 好了好了，别宠坏他吧，”伊内斯笑着说。 然而，你一松开那个男孩的手，她立刻又把他抱回了怀里。谁在宠坏谁呢……？ 你摇摇头，转向艾琳娜：“嘿，关于…… [ynes.kidName] 还有他的未来。Ynes说，按照传统……” Eirina轻轻拍了拍你的肩膀：“早就办好了。当Ynes告诉我她怀孕了那天，我就把相关文件寄给了Evander王子。只要你们俩不打算把孩子…… [ynes.kidName] 变成了像他妈妈那样的符文法师，你就不需要担心我了。我之所以在这里，只是因为我在乎你。 [eirina.fucked |你们两个 |英尼斯 ]我才不会去检查我的新商品呢。” 伊内斯轻拍她的头表示感谢：“别把我的儿子称作‘商品’。” “我是说他……啊，算了。我先不打扰你们俩了——你们继续吧。 三 就这样吧。”艾琳娜站了起来，轻抚着…… [ynes.kidName] 他头也不回地朝门口走去，说道：“你们照顾好他们。 [pc.name]你挥了挥手，看着阿斯特里达指挥官离开了，然后又将注意力转向你的儿子——那个自由的儿子，没有受到寺庙的束缚。“你打算怎么安排他？把他留在这里吗？” 伊内斯坚定地点了点头。 是的，当然。天知道，我在这里的生活已经足够舒适了。我并不担心拯救世界，也不担心那些恶魔之类的问题，这些事情根本不需要我操心。大多数时候，我最害怕的其实就是把某本魔法书弄丢。不过，在完成我的职责之外，照顾一个男婴对我来说也不是什么难事。我觉得，除了工作之外，有一些其他的事情做对我来说也会很有好处。我相信图书馆也不会介意的，他表现得非常乖。” “嗯，他确实跟我很像。” “是啊，亲爱的，”伊内斯笑着说，“他对我的胸部也特别着迷呢。 看来这是家族遗传的吧。” 伊内斯弯曲一根手指，将你的脸拉到她面前，吻了你。你们俩又一起度过了片刻美好时光，尽情享受彼此的陪伴——以及你们刚出生的儿子的陪伴——直到最后，你们母子三人都开始打哈欠了。 你明白了我的意思，给他们俩各一个吻，然后回到楼上让他们休息吧。

I'm just here because I care about [eirina.fucked |you both |Ynes ], not to inspect my new merchandise." Ynes thanks her with a thump on top of the head. "Don't call my son merchandise." "I was saying he— agh, nevermind. I'm gonna leave you two — you three — to it." Eirina pushes herself up to her feet, pets [ynes.kidName] on the head, and makes for the door. "Take care of them, [pc.name]." You wave as the Astrida commander shows herself out, before turning your attention back to your son. Your free son, unbound to the temple. "What do you want to do with him? Keep him here?" Ynes nods firmly. "Yes, absolutely. Gods know, I have a comfortable enough life here. I'm not worried about saving the world, or demons, and all that you've got to occupy you. My worst fear most days is a misplaced grimoire. I can handle a baby boy on top of my duties, and... and I think it would do me some good, having something beyond work. I'm sure the library won't mind. He's very well-behaved." "Well, he takes after me." "Yes, pet," Ynes laughs, "he's obsessed with my boobs, too. Runs in the family, I suspect." Ynes crooks a finger, bringing you down into range for her to kiss you. The two of you spend a little while longer together, just enjoying each other's company — and the company of your newborn son — before eventually both partner and child start to yawn. You take the hint, give them both a kiss, and head back upstairs to let them rest. '

It's a small sitting room, dominated by a single plush armchair, a rug with colorful geometric patterns, and a crackling fireplace. Damn it all!" the Astrida hisses, flailing her way to her feet. "I'm going, I'm going!" ]
rows.translation: [flags.YNES_FORBIDDEN |又一轮学习开始了， [ynes.fucked |宠物 |[pc.mf |兄弟 |姐姐 ] [pc.name] ]? 你难道不就是一个贪得无厌的学者吗！还是说……你只是乐于抓住这样的机会罢了？ 真的吗 难道你想再次‘接触’我的身体吗？”她笑着，冲你抛了一个媚眼。“嗯，这座寺庙不就是为满足人们好奇的心而建造的吗？ |伊内斯靠在椅背上，用那双冰冷的铜色眼睛注视着你。“嗯，你知道，不是第一个这么说的人。几乎每一个了解到我这些纹身的人都会试图接近我。” “然后呢？” “然后我就让他们滚远点。即使是来自古老心脏地带的外国贵宾，甚至是王子的宫廷法师瓦斯科，也不例外。把这当作我获得自由的一个条件吧。”她停顿了一下，手指交叉在一起，“但是…… [ynes.fucked |也许，你是个例外吧。毕竟，你经常有机会看到我的裸体，不是吗？ |你真是个…… [pc.mf |非常独特的补充，真是太棒了。 兄弟, |姐姐 ] 属于该组织。 ] 而且你得到了艾琳娜的信任。就我曾经拥有的魔法力量而言，这种信任同样具有极高的价值。 ] 伊内斯叹了口气，站起身来，将双手插进长袍的袖子里。“来吧，跟我走。” 女巫带你穿过一扇侧门，沿着那条同样寒冷而蜿蜒的石洞前进，最终来到了阿斯特里达的神圣之地。她从长袍里取出一把钥匙，打开了门，让你走了进去，然后又在你身后把门锁上了。 这边，请。”伊内斯说着，带你走进从中央石桌大厅分出的众多房间之一。这是一个小客厅，里面有一把柔软的扶手椅、一块印有彩色几何图案的地毯，以及一个正在噼啪作响的壁炉。 有 [rand |一个年仅十二岁的年轻女孩阿斯特里达，此刻正坐在这里，腿上放着一本厚得几乎有她整个上半身那么大的魔法书。伊内斯干脆抓住她的胳膊，把她扔出了门外：“走开，阿妮丝，去和你们的姐妹们一起玩吧。” 小女孩撅着小嘴抱怨道：“可她们都很无趣啊！” “如果你继续这样，长大后就会没有朋友了，”伊内斯说道，“别像我一样，要多和别人交往，学会社交啊。 |一个身材魁梧的女子坐在这里，膝上放着小织布机，正在编织另一块地毯。 “能让我们安静一会儿吗？”伊内斯走上前，轻轻抚摸着那个牛头女子的角。 “哦，当然可以，”这位女牛仔愉快地回答道，一边收拾她的工具，一边对你笑了笑：“冠军，一定要温柔对待她哦！ |里面空无一人，火也已经熄成了一堆余烬。伊内斯吐了吐舌头，又添了几块木头进去，然后用火棍把火重新拨旺了。 |房间里目前有两个人：一位名叫阿斯特里达的女子坐在扶手椅上，一位霜鳞女祭司坐在她的腿上，两人几乎只穿着内裤和睡衣。 “哦！看来不止我们这样啊，”伊内斯笑着说，“不好意思打扰了。” “不不，我们马上就走。”女祭司惊慌地说道，一边从地上捡起自己的长袍。阿斯特里达冷冷地看了她们一眼，然后从椅子上站起来，陪着那位女祭司离开了房间。 |一位坐在扶手椅上的阿斯特丽达——或者说，她侧躺在椅子的扶手上，一本书盖在她的脸上，她那幽绿色的尾焰也黯淡成了微弱的余火。 “姐姐，快醒醒！”伊内斯厉声说道，她抓起那本书，猛地扔在蝾螈的脸上。“艾琳娜小姐正在到处寻找你呢。” “啊！该死！”阿斯特丽达嘶声道，挣扎着站了起来。“我这就去，我这就去！ ]

rows.original:
Ynes closes the door and turns about, pressing her back to it. "Now then. I suppose we ought to get to work, hm?" She takes her time unraveling the belt around her waist, and letting her robes hang off her shoulders — or rather, hang off her prodigious tits like a canopy. The witch takes a long-legged step towards the armchair, letting her black robe slip off with a sensual grace. Apel, lilac-tattooed flesh is laid bare to the light, obscured only by her long silk gloves and stockings. Each breast is capped with arcane circles surrounding big, pink areola; even her sex is blemished with swirling runes that draw the eye and don't let go. 
    
    "Mmm, pick your jaw up off the floor, my dear. It's [ynes.fucked
        |nothing you haven't seen before!
        |what you wanted, isn't it?
    ]" She slinks down onto the arm of the chair, crossing one leg over the other, letting you get your eyes all over those arcane edifices that make up her naked body. "Pick a part of me that interests you, and I will elucidate on its latent power."
rows.translation:
伊内斯关上门，转身靠在门上。“那么，我想我们该开始工作了，嗯？”她慢条斯理地解开腰间的腰带，让长袍从肩上垂下来——或者更准确地说，让那对巨大的胸部像华盖一样垂下来。 女巫迈着修长的步伐走向扶手椅，她那黑色长袍以一种充满魅力的方式从身上滑落。阿佩尔那带着淡紫色纹身的肌肤暴露在光线下，只有她那长丝质的手套和长袜才遮挡住了部分肌肤。她的双乳上各有一个由神秘符号构成的圆圈，环绕着粉红色的乳晕；就连她的私密部位也布满了那些令人无法移开视线的旋转符文。 
    
    嗯，亲爱的，把你的下巴从地上抬起来吧。现在该…… [ynes.fucked
        |这不过是你以前见过的东西罢了！
        |这就是你想要的，对吧？
    ]她慵懒地靠在椅子上，一条腿交叉在另一条腿上，让你能够尽情欣赏她那充满魅力的身体。 “请选择你感兴趣的我的某个部位，我会向你解释它所蕴含的神秘力量。

rows.original: You lift up one of the witch's tattooed hands, pressing down her sheer silk glove with your thumb. Beneath it, you can just make out the swirling lilac runes of a spell, invocations of elemental fire and... something about the mind? "Ah, you've got a keen eye. This one was one of my master's own inventions. It came to him in a dream, he said. One of his first steps on the road to madness." Ynes daintily pulls on each finger of her glove, and then presents it to you to remove the rest of the way, revealing the purple tattoos in their entirety. "Have you ever experimented with phosphorus, [pc.name]? Veins of it reached deep into the mountainous heart of our home, Corlund. It burns like a white sun, and a little water isn't near enough to extinguish it. My master claimed he had a dream of injected white-hot phosphorus into a servant's flesh, burning him alive from inside. Within a week he'd developed this spell... and had tested it on a butler who'd displeased him. He was so pleased that he inked it into my flesh the next day, to ensure that he would never forget it." Ynes curls her fingers. "This spell is a potent defensive tool. Touch a man, and light him on fire from inside. Keep striking, keep stoking the flame, until nothing remains but ashes. Copy the runes, but not my master's intent to use them: this spell is one of the most painful things you can experience." You lift her arm up, turning it around in front of you so you can see each one of the arcane sigils tattooed from elbow to wrist. It's hard to imagine such a soft, beautiful woman as Ynes possessing such a horrific spell, much less ever using it. "Don't give me that look. You know what I am," Ynes sighs. "What I was. Why do you think I wear these gloves, hm?" You commit the runes to memory the best you can, tracing each of them one by one with your fingertips. Invocations of fire, elemental binding, a conjuration sigil... gods, this spell really does just drive spears of burning phosphor under the target's skin. You can't help but [pc.isDK |lick your lips |grimace ] — it's no wonder Eirina would consider this to be among her forbidden spells. When you've finished, you [ynes.fucked |lace your fingers through hers and give her hand a squeeze |clasp your hand over hers ]. "All done." "Good. I pray you keep this as just a magical curiosity, Champion... or do evil only unto evil, as the Tirans might suggest."
rows.translation: 你抬起女巫那只纹有图案的手，用拇指按住了她那层薄薄的丝绸手套。在手套下面，你隐约能够看到那些旋转的淡紫色符文——这些符文代表着某种魔法，是召唤火元素的咒语……还有，似乎与精神力量有关的东西？ 啊，你真有敏锐的眼光。这个是我师父自己发明的。他说，这个想法是在梦中出现的——这也是他走向疯狂之路的最初一步。” 伊内斯小心翼翼地拉了拉手套的每一根指套，然后将其递给你，让你帮她把剩下的部分也脱掉，这样那些紫色纹身就能完全显露出来了。 你曾经试过用磷来进行实验吗？ [pc.name]它的脉络深入我们家园科伦德那连绵起伏的山脉之中。它燃烧着，如同白色的太阳，再多的水也远远不足以将其扑灭。我的主人曾说，他做过一个梦：将炽热的磷注入仆人的体内，从内部将他们活活烧死。 在一周的时间里，他研制出了这个咒语……然后在一个让他不悦的管家身上试验了这个咒语。他对此非常满意，以至于第二天就把这个咒语刻在了我的身上，以确保自己永远不会忘记它。 伊内斯蜷缩着自己的手指。 这个法术是一种极其强大的防御工具。只要触碰到目标，就会从内部将其点燃。持续攻击，不断煽动火焰，直到目标只剩下灰烬。你可以模仿这些符文，但千万不要复制我师父使用它们的意图——这个法术绝对能带来极其剧烈的痛苦。你将她的手臂抬起来，在自己面前转动，这样就能看到从肘部到手腕处纹着的那些神秘符文。很难想象像伊内斯这样柔弱美丽的女性，会掌握如此可怕的法术，更不用说还会使用它们了。 使用 别用那种眼神看我。你知道我是什么人，”伊内斯叹了口气，“或者说，我曾经是什么人。你们为什么觉得我会戴这些手套呢，嗯？” 你尽力将那些符文牢记在心，用指尖一一描摹它们的轮廓。火系法术、元素束缚术、召唤符文……天啊，这个法术真的太…… 做 就像在目标的皮肤下插入燃烧的磷针一样，你根本无法抗拒这种感觉。 [pc.isDK |流口水了 |做出痛苦的表情 ] — 难怪艾琳娜会认为这是她那些被禁止使用的法术之一。 当你完成后，你…… [ynes.fucked |将你的手指与她的手指交叉在一起，轻轻握住她的手。 |将你的手放在她的手上 ]全部完成了。” “很好。我希望你能把这件事仅仅当作一种神奇的奇观来对待，冠军……或者就像暴君们所建议的那样，只用邪恶来对抗邪恶。
rows.raw: " You lift up one of the witch's tattooed hands, pressing down her sheer silk glove with your thumb. Beneath it, you can just make out the swirling lilac runes of a spell, invocations of elemental fire and... something about the mind? "Ah, you've got a keen eye. This one was one of my master's own inventions. It came to him in a dream, he said. One of his first steps on the road to madness." Ynes daintily pulls on each finger of her glove, and then presents it to you to remove the rest of the way, revealing the purple tattoos in their entirety. "Have you ever experimented with phosphorus, [pc.name]? Veins of it reached deep into the mountainous heart of our home, Corlund. It burns like a white sun, and a little water isn't near enough to extinguish it. My master claimed he had a dream of injected white-hot phosphorus into a servant's flesh, burning him alive from inside. Within a week he'd developed this spell... and had tested it on a butler who'd displeased him. He was so pleased that he inked it into my flesh the next day, to ensure that he would never forget it." Ynes curls her fingers. "This spell is a potent defensive tool. Touch a man, and light him on fire from inside. Keep striking, keep stoking the flame, until nothing remains but ashes. Copy the runes, but not my master's intent to use them: this spell is one of the most painful things you can experience." You lift her arm up, turning it around in front of you so you can see each one of the arcane sigils tattooed from elbow to wrist. It's hard to imagine such a soft, beautiful woman as Ynes possessing such a horrific spell, much less ever using it. "Don't give me that look. You know what I am," Ynes sighs. "What I was. Why do you think I wear these gloves, hm?" You commit the runes to memory the best you can, tracing each of them one by one with your fingertips. Invocations of fire, elemental binding, a conjuration sigil... gods, this spell really does just drive spears of burning phosphor under the target's skin. You can't help but [pc.isDK |lick your lips |grimace ] — it's no wonder Eirina would consider this to be among her forbidden spells. When you've finished, you [ynes.fucked |lace your fingers through hers and give her hand a squeeze |clasp your hand over hers ]. "All done." "Good. I pray you keep this as just a magical curiosity, Champion... or do evil only unto evil, as the Tirans might suggest." "

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original: "What are these?" you ask, resting your fingertips on Ynes's collarbone. The lilac tattoos around her neck and shoulders invoke fire and illusions at once... a strange combination. "Ah, yes..." Ynes puts her hands around your wrists, guiding your exploration to where the spell begins. "A spell we discovered in the depths of my master's manse, a relic of Old Belhar. Hypercranial Combustion is the name we gave it. It's a little more insidious than that, though." The witch guides your hand to the illusory patterns, just beneath her throat. "You can convince your target that they're suffering from an acute fever... and the body goes along with it, heating up, cooking the brain. It's maddening. Difficult to do anything when you can't think straight." You can imagine. "Another spell that tricks the body into hurting itself, huh?" you muse, teasing your fingertips around Ynes's neck. "And it's from Old Belhar?" "Oh, yes, a relic from the Golden Age. Strange, isn't it? We often think of black magic as the brainchild of the Wraith-touched, creatures corrupted by unholy demons, but... the estate we excavated, my master and I, it was far older than the Godswar. An earthquake had collapsed it, with the magister-lord still inside, a century before the demons first made earthfall. Truth be told, I wonder if that's why Eirina was first dispatched to Corlund, to investigate rumors that we'd found the old estate... but she won't admit it, if that's the case." Ynes leans forward into your hands, letting them wrap around her throat. "For the evil I've done, you'd be well within your rights to wring my neck... but instead, you're here to learn the wicked magic we unearthed. What does that say about [pc.ra astrida |the Order Astrida |you ] in the end, I wonder?" The silence that follows is broken only by Ynes's haughty laughter. "Go ahead, study my body. Drink in the knowledge of our forebears. If the Order wanted to cover it up completely, they'd have killed me long ago."
rows.translation: 这些是什么？”你问道，指尖轻触着Ynes的锁骨。她脖子和肩膀上那些淡紫色的纹身似乎同时引发了火焰与幻象……真是种奇怪的组合。 “啊，是的……”Ynes握住你的手腕，引导你探寻这个咒语的起源。“这是我们在我师父的宅邸深处发现的一个咒语，是古老贝尔哈尔留下的遗迹。 颅顶燃烧 这就是我们给它起的名字。不过，它的危害其实比这更隐蔽。” 女巫将你的手引导到她喉咙下方那些虚幻的图案上。“你可以让你的目标相信，他们正在遭受急性发热的折磨。身体也会随之发生变化，温度升高，甚至会‘‘煮’’坏大脑。这种感觉简直让人发疯——当无法正常思考时，根本什么都做不了。” 你可以想象，这又是一种利用魔法让身体自我伤害的招数，对吧？你这样说着，手指轻轻抚过伊妮丝的脖颈，”“而这东西真的是来自古老的贝拉尔吗？” “哦，没错，这是黄金时代的遗物。真是奇怪，不是吗？我们通常认为黑魔法是那些被邪灵侵蚀、被邪恶恶魔腐蚀的生物所创造出来的，但是……我们和我师父挖掘出的那座古宅，其历史远比“神战”时期要悠久。那场地震使得古宅倒塌，而那位大领主当时还被困在里面——那是在恶魔首次降临地球的一个世纪之前。说实话，我一直在想，是否正是因为这个原因，艾琳娜才会被派往科伦德，去调查那些关于我们发现了那座古宅的传闻。……但她不肯承认这一点，如果真是那样的话。” 伊内斯向前倾身，让你的手环绕住她的脖子。“对于我所犯下的罪行，你完全有权利掐断我的脖子……但相反，你却来到了这里，想要学习我们发现的那些邪恶魔法。 这说明了什么呢？ [pc.ra astrida |阿斯特里达秩序 |你 ] 最终，我在想……” 随之而来的寂静，只有伊内斯那高傲的笑声打破了。“去吧，仔细研究我的身体吧。汲取我们祖先留下的知识吧。如果那个组织真的想把这件事彻底掩盖，他们早就杀了我了。

rows.original: "What have we here?" you ask, grasping Ynes's right hand. Even her fingertips are covered in tattoos, visible through the thin silk of her negligee. "These look like illusion spells." "An illusion spell, one of the most potent in my arsenal. One I developed myself, in point of fact." You raise an eyebrow. "Really? I thought you were your master's spellbook." "Ah, well, of course I had to share my discoveries with him, and in turn, he would mark my body with my magic too. This one was... ah... a lark of fancy, if you will. I was deep in the depths of corruption, reveling in my own power... and my power over others, in particular. I wasn't a pretty girl growing up, [ynes.fucked |pet |Champion ]. I played with the boys in our village when I was young, and then they ignored me in my teens. I wasn't even a woman to them... I wonder if they ever knew how much I lusted after them; how much I craved to be seen by them. Well, I made it a point to make sure they came to know." Ynes licks her lips. "This spell... it turns someone into your puppet, pulls the strings of their mind with implanted desires and fabricated reality. I would use this spell to tempt boys from the village up to the manor, and then... mmm, I'd seduce them with illusions, rooms full of beautiful maidens, waiting on them hand and foot, exploiting their own desires to fulfil mine." She wiggles her fingers, making them dance in the air. "Oh, yes, they'd give in. Every one of them, they'd cave in to the idea of gorgeous noblewomen paying them a lick of attention, those pathetic meat-headed farmboys! How they'd let me turn them into barking dogs for my amusement! I loved nothing more than to sit idly in my chambers, watching a muscle-bound hunk of a farmhand hump my pillow, plowing it with all the passion of a stallion! Or better yet, I'd bring in two boys, and use my magic to convince each of them that the other was a maiden..." Ynes shivers. "That was heaven, sipping wine and watching the boys fuck for my amusement, totally disconnected from reality. I wonder what went through the mind of the bottom — did he secretly crave a hermaphrodite's touch, or was he sure his partner's hand was a pussy, and his cock just a finger? Mmph!" "Okay, okay," you say, pulling Ynes's glove off. "You've made your point!" The witch grimaces. "Ah. Of course, I... perhaps I got carried away." Ynes presses her thighs together and leans back against the chair. "Well, learn away, Champion. You too can possess this power, by Eirina's leave. I hope you make better use of it than I did... [ynes.fucked |I know you have better luck with women than I did with men, at least. You hardly need the help. |I would hope, at least, that the vaunted Champion has more self-confidence than an ugly farm-girl did. You hardly need to help to get your rocks off, hm? ]" You ignore the comment and trace the sigils with your thumbs, taking each in turn, one finger after the other. Ynes holds her hand out in dainty fashion, as if she were a noblewomen presenting it to be kissed. [ynes.fucked |You do just that once you've finished examining her pinky, pressing your [pc.lips] to her knuckles. "Thank you, my lady." "Oh, pet!" Ynes smiles, wrapping her legs around your waist and pulling you closer. "Aren't you full of charm today. How I wish I could weave this spell on you. I could be your noble maiden, for a night... Alas!" |You just squeeze it. "Done." ]

rows.original: You walk around behind Ynes, following the curves of her shoulders, and the runes etched upon her pale flesh all the way around her back. "What're these?" you ask, brushing a bit of ginger hair out of the way. "These runes are... menacing." "Keen eye," Ynes says, leaning forward on her elbows to let you take a better look at the tattoo work. "This spell is an illusion, and perhaps the most unpleasant of them all — so much so that my master made sure it was inked somewhere I couldn't see it all at once even in a mirror. He was terrified I might use it on him, I suppose. He never quite reasoned that I could just have one of my servants transcribe it into a separate grimoire." She laughs. "This spell inflicts true horror into the psyche of its target, forcing them to confront their deepest and most personal fears, turning each moment into a living torment. Altogether one of the least dangerous spells my master discovered in the ruins, but certainly unpleasant." "How did he find it?" you ask, running your hands along the runes, silently mouthing each in turn. "This one... ah, a product of his drug-fueled meditations. My master would often descend deep into the ruins, hoping to commune with the spirits lingering in the darkness. He said things whispered to him down there... but I never heard a peep from his supposed muse of the arcane. Though perhaps I was reticent to take quite as [silly |much LSD |many hallucinogenic mushrooms ]." She snickers, trying to use that to hide the way she shivers as your fingers touch her bare back. "Do you think it was a Wraith?" Ynes shakes her head. "No. I doubt it. The estate predates the Godswar by a century, so any spirits bound within it would have been... wylder spirits, perhaps? Some sort of votive god from before the Seven reigned supreme? Corlund was home to countless ghosts of the past like that. Or, I think, perhaps it was all a hallucination and my master simply conjured the spell from his own genius." Genius is a word for it alright, this spell's brutally simple, nothing but illusions to conjure up something from the target's mind. You circle around the naked witch, examining each of her myriad tattoos in turn. One above all others catches your eye: a falling cascade of protective sigils flanking her spine, like the base of a pair of wings. You put two fingers on either side, tracing the curve of her back from shoulder to rump. 
    
    "Mmm, you've got a good eye. That spell was one of my favorites." Ynes takes a deep breath, closing her eyes while you explore her body. "So much so that when my master inked it on me, I sacrificed... quite a lot... to have it become charged, feeding off my own bodily energy so it was always active."
    
    "That's impressive," you murmur. "Does it still work?"
    
    Ynes shakes her head. "Not after I became Dreamless."
    
    "So what does this spell do, exactly?"
    
    "It's a mantle of war, opening you to the ebbs and flows of ambient magical energy, letting you draw so much more into yourself than you otherwise could... for good and ill. It was the first truly advanced spell my master taught me... I wonder if, perhaps, overuse of it precipitated our fall. I think about such things, from time to time — w
    ere we entirely to blame, or was there truly some dark force influencing our minds from the depths of the estate? Eirina tells me not to waste time on such thoughts, that what's done is done... but I can't help myself." 
    
    Ynes shakes her head sadly. "Regardless, take a good look at this spell, and use it when things are dire. You'll find your spells far harder to resist, and your focus will sharpen... but be warned, opening yourself to magic means you're more open to magic: I wouldn't risk casting this when you're about to face another spellcaster."
    
    "And you had that going all the time?"
    
    "My master and I were the only spellcasters for miles around!" Ynes laughs. "And I think it made him feel safer, knowing I was more vulnerable to his magic. In case he ever wanted to... put me in my place."

rows.original: "Well, if you're finished," Ynes says, slipping up from her seat. "Hand me my robe. It wouldn't do to let anyone else see these spells." When you hand Ynes the thick black robe, she catches your wrist. "Though I hope you don't think you're getting away that easily. [ynes.fucked |I didn't let you put your hands all over me out of charity, pet. Come with me." |You can't master a spell just by reading the runes. You need practice. Come." ] Ynes throws her clothes back on and drags you out of the sitting room, through the stone table room and down into another training chamber with a sand floor and shields hung up all along the wall. It doesn't take much for Ynes to round up a couple of novitiate Astrida — gangly late teens whose black scales are still glossy and smooth. "Don't worry, their anti-magic's already come in. You won't be able to hurt them... too badly." And so the rest of the day is spent in repetition of your newly-learned spell, under Ynes's sharp-tongued tutelage. The poor initiates have to tap out before long, replaced by other trainee Astrida, over and over until the witch is completely satisfied that you've mastered her magic — and you've worn yourself out to the bone. "Well, perhaps you have some talent for the arcane after all. You managed to tucker out a whole band of apprentice magehunters!" Ynes says, clapping. She tries to make it sound condescending, but there's a hint of pride in her voice. You doubt most mages would have been able to take one even one Astrida, trainee or not. "We're done here. Thank you, ladies. Go clean yourselves up before Eirina sees the state of you," Ynes says, ushering the blackscales towards the door. "And you, [pc.name]... you can go clean up, too. Back to the surface with you. I'm sure you can find your way." You nod and head back the way you came... only to realize the morning light's streaming through the stained glass windows. How long were you down ther!?

rows.raw:
"
    "I've got places to be," you insist, slipping away. Ynes huffs, pawing at your shoulder. "You're such a tease. But fine, go and practice in the field... I suppose I'll recover somehow. Shoo. I'll follow later."
    
    You lean in and give the witch a squeeze before heading out, retracing your steps to the temple sanctum.
    "

rows.translation: 下一个
